name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
You’ve helped us build a WINNING campaign! [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=294f3943ec674221ae2a6dc2b666d97a&_e=-kuxhlRTHFI73DkWZ_pypiCChscvAxCglOlbXXu62fhdakp8tt5LxPpCvZyGdNc4nFKZLmzBRzKZgadIgNHVXT0m-1wdgX94A_fLhYdnGoVitGRJQ99lYUnWXwRrEIkraJBGBKkjk7wJbXLp_eIXnSDWHR8zRAQuACgNH-2dEUROv6nrMojtMeTRkng891_sxgrMTHm7aeJ2u73p3_YpR9Y7M2_z7FMUMIfksP2Iid7943MJ_yKa2aDro4z24SgRecVrK3vfHYUh4Y25DlS18Q%3D%3D) Peter, I’m writing to thank you for your generous support over the past year. **2021 fundraising numbers became public this week – and I’m extremely proud to announce what we’ve achieved. ** Because of supporters like you, our campaign raised **$850,000** in 2021 from **1,500+ donors** – the _most ever_ by a challenger in this district in a non-election year. To put that in perspective... **We substantially outraised our opponent,** incumbent Democrat Congresswoman Julia Brownley, who brought in $601,000 in individual contributions last year. Now, to be fair, Brownley also took in $336,000 from special interest PACs – giving her a slight advantage in _total_ 2021 contributions. But the fact remains that our **grassroots support** brought us to near-parity with Brownley (a 27-year career politician and party-line Pelosi Democrat). **That’s practically unheard of for a challenger.** And there are two main reasons for our unprecedented success... First, people _believe_ in our commonsense, conservative message. And second, people _know we can WIN!_ Our momentum is also reflected in the many early endorsements we’ve received – including from the Ventura County Republican Party, local law enforcement organizations like the Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association, GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy, a majority of California Republicans in Congress, and many other community leaders. Like you, these endorsers know that we can _TAKE BACK CA-26 and the HOUSE_ in November. So **THANK YOU** for your early and generous support. I pledge to repay your faith by continuing to work as hard as possible for the people of CA26. And I can’t wait to see what 2022 brings! With gratitude, Matt Jacobs | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=294f3943ec674221ae2a6dc2b666d97a&_e=-kuxhlRTHFI73DkWZ_pypp2_clONCAQkMDkr5v6TPEj_9esSFPX1VtQnEGR0drZS3fd0HwIiUZeyu_CWg_WpHySVTkDqlVqdoyPbS6nq9iwF-eW9l-uZhaQdbWS6hYXt40XxOS9aWra0gcmbYQ90YqDAQKNQBNjtjc9QSHwxyncOf24jd9IF3rorlARmuF6gt8n8Z9skXHkKqj7zBH9yN-Xfhv_L77Ke6pI2DglIZwlWERimo6Ri5ddIUqksr9hZWyL8sifJG3afs8Tc3NkV1g%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=294f3943ec674221ae2a6dc2b666d97a&_e=-kuxhlRTHFI73DkWZ_pypmnhD92BhlQPCMXi4QRtbmgBfoFjaYX7P-KVPdrmuA1sPMRYUbDx3IG3ufg5hdw3-2sb2iNFLlLJsYdNHHXKaVWjBteJlWUsuFc9QJODuMS0M7Q2qM4Zu4QMexnWPP_9hQvKsToZuY3I4EuuU11FjNRn17FJ8JnA05OkVijkbX_k3GxYJ5DdzlAKHa-FsjV0s9CsjEleJl6MbymGbGMKgr7x8R6CuXD2bgFW7UmqKXzhRAumzCfgtYa_nPT338TEPA%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=294f3943ec674221ae2a6dc2b666d97a&_e=-kuxhlRTHFI73DkWZ_pyptWx1_ehSTI4rXCdy3g6RTwHghKo9ouQ8MYZFODYGBxT0HT_uzbGcscUXrpvvKPQh6ZZRbryz66oEUySUVYNx3cbHOO-VyWAmF7MxCLMpLDqiSdOLiGV3vsz996xiPsajWbWAPDLfDn0_7suBimSZok3OiSs9NNmz3SBNp_URkkXLwgkeVtYr_2OC-O-p1oxoxqK4GAEDbE_t8qU4eXoCr0_BIe0WHg-NAyXE-XQ_R7X_3trAhGF2vEwkbRhfc5M8SmKQvowPvAbH9iV5ijzZH4%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=294f3943ec674221ae2a6dc2b666d97a&_e=-kuxhlRTHFI73DkWZ_pypv9JAmZ-peaT6VZveBveix1L0Sp3WdPJ44rfnX7E9iOjm-bq-Fzi027qJ8AMqcA_ulUFjwdEMRk6dpY4cHzlrX-_qnnKGNJGbrJwmYVC2bBU3qu5CV8Y7oWfobP1JfQjPj9IC_AViFxE6t3UXturb-hwOfRPS7LEemzLkzThNOhV7_lQgXAbSqEyi0jjIIf-D8u2q4IErinhcU6S49gUTigCn2R7AFeYDndyTby6FMMQukDqqit3YT-eFMZE9svEwTsVk0BEFSbkyZJ5vrxcLjQ%3D)

_**“I can’t remember how many times they struck or clubbed me.”

“I did not cry out or try to defend myself.”

“I stared into his eyes with such hatred and defiance and disgust that he froze, backed away, and dropped his club.” **_
_**LISTEN BELOW TO THE FULL CLIP.**_ [ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=89538f80ce30495592e2bbfa1c32855f&_e=mQQWWKM8r0GayDslH7PNmzr48ahjd_RpAELxKLd8R5G8B1W1FgncXRJArd0R27_3uRZriVOddwados459mlczYK7Xojpr1TsN4ssZVAMYwazoe-OEE1BrRoG17cHqPEUUwik81dJk_bU8bowYzAy9zHdacwp-4N7ibIvru2zz8-vEQ8UwVetD9da3xJB77wCL9N51lm9umrTr7YIh4i2yuWWRQGZ2W2og0dT_GvDz2wfeq4_1IZas8r_wd2FsjrTmJdxlSWlVmTYY1NPmL_y1AJ70Wk50_Vj1n_vY16cbu14cCSm3nMZeUYUHW-u8B4oi9_5qH8a5swGNhqWhqwDa9Dp_grs_SsuEsFbND1F37NYb3uPP-S3ABbh8zvIKC5fBXKEkZ2oNQfB1DTbf5WAo7IW5MCcST650kQDg9UKtloQscDAvupcwKSL9XbO1xpjDM1XAE8Fzhxraph-NnSlLYRh2NF8CF3TErsjmWJSb1_NS5w56sz-71CGzHZaIF81-slo9s___J-zlQjLfgcwaQ%3D%3D)

**I was in a foxhole that day.**

I was thrown around like a ragdoll by this mob, but I survived because I didn’t stop fighting.

My campaign for U.S. Senate will be the same way. We will not stop fighting until we ensure that the good people of Alabama have someone representing them that cares about putting his country before themself.

Our fight is now on our soil against career politicians and Socialist Left leaders who want to see Democracy itself crumble. **I won’t let that happen.**

If you’re willing and able, _**please rush your support to our campaign below to fuel our fight.**_

name: Quaye Quartey
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress****
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41443746/328840496/-1689843803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNmNGQwYy0xYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8idvLpVGzOy5esxG4jwLSiX4CptH-CBx2Kk3TX-x2E=&emci=da2334e5-1d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d4cf4d0c-1a86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14505483) Team,

This Black History Month, I encourage you to reflect on the remarkable lives of Black folks and our many contributions to America. Let this time also serve as a reminder of our nation’s history and the struggles and hardships that Black Americans continue to face, even today. **Did you know it has been more than 20 years since California has been represented by a Black man in Congress?** Fortunately, we have the power to make history this November. As we honor those who came before us who paved the way for justice and equality, we must remember that there is still a lot of work to do to guarantee every American has the same opportunities, rights, and freedoms. So, while we celebrate, keep in mind that discrimination in any form is an everyday issue that does not disappear when this month ends. We can do better as people, as communities, and as a nation. I hope you’ll continue to follow my journey to the U.S. Congress to serve again. Chale Wote! Happy Black History Month. Sincerely,

clean_body: Team, This Black History Month, I encourage you to reflect on the remarkable lives of Black folks and our many contributions to America. Let this time also serve as a reminder of our nation’s history and the struggles and hardships that Black Americans continue to face, even today. Did you know it has been more than 20 years since California has been represented by a Black man in Congress? Fortunately, we have the power to make history this November. As we honor those who came before us who paved the way for justice and equality, we must remember that there is still a lot of work to do to guarantee every American has the same opportunities, rights, and freedoms. So, while we celebrate, keep in mind that discrimination in any form is an everyday issue that does not disappear when this month ends. We can do better as people, as communities, and as a nation. I hope you’ll continue to follow my journey to the U.S. Congress to serve again. Chale Wote! Happy Black History Month. Republicans in the Senate are doing everything they can to obstruct, delay, and destroy President Biden’s agenda! **_But we’re not going to let them!_**

_President Biden will be giving a State of the Union Address on his super-popular agenda – and we need to PROVE that good Democrats like you will watch!_

If we can confirm that 7,500 Democrats in your state will be watching, we can show Republicans just how popular President Biden is!

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=1)
---
### February 4, 2022
Friend -- It’s been another busy two weeks at the Republican Party of Wisconsin. As we continue to finalize details ahead of our 2022 State Convention, we are excited to take the fight to the heart of blue Dane County and gather with you all in Middleton this May. Read more details on how you can secure your room for convention below! Additionally, the WisGOP is continuing to ramp up our ground game operation ahead of our crucial elections in 2022. Make sure to stay up-to-date on the next big event in your community on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0SsIN05Kq52csGqnQtqVEFs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=2) , and if you aren’t already involved in the Party locally, sign up to join your County Republican Party [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=3). As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP |
We are excited to announce the room block information for the 2022 WisGOP State Convention! Click the link [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ZRfhLjPwWZH77u2aU41nPSoseAayhNvf06PPb_bX6dQT7RKbnhltXoXo2i0RbwKZpg0uwytoCXSy9wbOaBTVrJPYzZqlokox-e6WkgWNYxMntczijN7YK4KPAPl6n6MdbADASPwUDkXsX9dMkA5iFHsnFw4GwePMs980t2HRY7M0Hp3rYvmi1rt2npUuLO-AJUtg-R0s40oXVxqwOVwj2DANbnMaago0v2RPP8Oo7dQKpNIdohTzkg2Bpv0wWfp0r8U_QtGJA3Awd5f9zw9psmPFtr4mSiBD43zIbh7MpL3SAU1EoJVNPgMJqnCcoqjzk46TVOHgLu8FiDLS92VDP_ad6J_TmhN5XKrsyxSmjsUcH6U9_pYj7UCqoqpW93dT5IsQaydA9RKLlM9HT-zvJbjm-FCFgsPP7mUhamk9BUwGVdUYp8zqQmUgW1HQ2kHCDBlnhAtZzJvBh6ll_SA2pGHhdKkfZZA_oxtAuf853VukBE_rpy1kQz5EI_oJToN7qb6Nv3s0GEjqLEpTFHMwX9CtN1mt5WfRMmOmCWNBkPD3Valpf_5DIKnBTG-pFkGC7hi4X6igNYNe4gzxKmVdASpvSwhwGYApVJR-uRPUcs6XgbzgNPtQgVO92KgTnV_w3sfTUS3veBwngewnUP_1YWHdJ49Nr-3crFDNgzzQlsg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=4) to reserve your room at the Madison Marriott West at our special group rate. Convention will be here before we know it, so don’t delay! As the media continues to join Democrats’ pile-on with false narratives surrounding Republicans’ alternate electors meeting in December 2020, we are setting the record straight. Republican electors met in order to preserve legal options while lawsuits were still outstanding. Democrats know this, but they’re feigning outrage in order to distract from their failed record. While the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel today wrote a clickbait [**article**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouNBHja3sfdY8_xeAgIvnS9TISWX7eomJtnvKYzpkXuOLTaw-kS8mMfT0Byq2kgTj2AitMqTPiDxdztFDfzyLHKjVYo7nclTXZy1dXF_vyHXPBYM1jqK3ADvwTM_YOoSLX3rJg4mxuj-EqlZ-AxGXtCJ0lrva3iEq_xrMgSFSb2zGF-rxGcSbk5qcN7kTjCxAj_sftJFlPpF-F_REwKUInDe&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=5) in hopes of creating drama surrounding the “secrecy” of the meeting, they neglected to include the fact that WisGOP officials were speaking with reporters from the outlet in real-time, which we reminded them of in our official statement. Of course, that portion of the statement wasn’t included in the story. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will continue to **[debunk](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TrLCdjL6HzWBUqPfp7F3TiXmYl6T95tXGAU7JaBbUas4m8Ws-LASy3mMuWfnw09K320ELZIzWbtHawPTXHKIj04Dyykjp8D00WwvJdzqhVcK&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=6)** these false narratives and push back on Democrats’ political theater pile-on. | |

Last week, Wisconsinites celebrated National School Choice Week! Since Governor Tommy Thompson launched the modern school choice movement, Wisconsin has boasted a proud history of supporting educational choice, which creates better outcomes for students and expands opportunities for success. Today, over 48,000 Wisconsin children benefit from school choice – allowing students of all backgrounds to obtain a quality education. You can read our full statement [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAVmzWH5437r0p3Iy_8ETwAtIH915UrB4dz1e81txwUiOb59iyS4ketF_LJ25wpvDzc&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=7) , and if you are interested in participating in one of Wisconsin’s school choice programs, you can check your eligibility and apply on behalf of your child [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=Gv9Gq5TgQLC4kEbZDXripL9ZDL8PD9Ydf-JYAJJlJEZ3xVsEVqpeKvyPlJnQwE2bj06NzYa52QT3P3gHD50GM-XBGZyqRup5lTKWfCjt9VVM8HYFVnLjKqSEkjimljdV&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=8). Last week, Milwaukee was struck by yet another horrific act of violence after a sheriff’s deputy was shot following a traffic stop. Tragically, this is only the most recent event in a two-year crime spike, as the city once again set a record for homicides in 2021. Meanwhile, Tony Evers is missing in action. After his performative press conference on violence prevention in Milwaukee last October that was interrupted by gunfire, Evers has been mum on rising crime while Wisconsin communities continue to suffer. Wisconsinites deserve a governor who will truly stand up for public safety – not throw arbitrary dollar amounts on a press release.
---|---|---
* * *
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=9) | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our **[website](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0ahw3PTL6JsP8slQyv_Z45W1tpC4bxcjwcY7pLDfF8cTNlZrezZB2oVgQgpQzhDJdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=10)**.
---|---|---
* * *
### **In Case You Missed It...**
### _[**SHOT/CHASER: Tony Evers Flip-Flops on Child Tax Credit**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0b0iDneDiZEQtzvXvCo8Cpq6InZW09EvoqBA5Wmrub1H9mKGgiiahl2W96NH9IwbfFRap-MeEDxWuhfGbnefWVQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=11)_
In 2018, Tony Evers said that “flip-flopping” is not a “great re-election strategy.” Nonetheless, Tony Evers proposed the same child tax credit policy that he opposed while running for governor in 2018. Try as Evers might to explain that “this is not a re-election thing,” despite the fact that he opposed this very policy until his re-election year, Wisconsinites see the truth behind his sudden change of heart.
### [_Statement on Kamala Harris in Milwaukee_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R72aAQRdpUWAFwuxNARiAXWXjNR1JH5I8QAhCT4CvA-a4n0AnqMVN8XhhhYyUHOm9wXcaqXVof9FtdpDTsHXqM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_2_4_22_v1&n=12)
Kamala Harris is trying to play damage control for Joe Biden’s disastrous first year in office. If Harris spent more time addressing the border crisis, working to lower prices, or fixing the crippled supply chain and less time on photo opps, perhaps the Biden administration’s approval rating would be better than 33 percent.
### **Worth the Read**

clean_body: The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin | | February 4, 2022 Friend -- It’s been another busy two weeks at the Republican Party of Wisconsin. As we continue to finalize details ahead of our 2022 State Convention, we are excited to take the fight to the heart of blue Dane County and gather with you all in Middleton this May. Read more details on how you can secure your room for convention below! Additionally, the WisGOP is continuing to ramp up our ground game operation ahead of our crucial elections in 2022. Make sure to stay up-to-date on the next big event in your community on our website , and if you aren’t already involved in the Party locally, sign up to join your County Republican Party . As always, thanks for all you do! \- Team WisGOP | We are excited to announce the room block information for the 2022 WisGOP State Convention! Click the link to reserve your room at the Madison Marriott West at our special group rate. Convention will be here before we know it, so don’t delay! As the media continues to join Democrats’ pile-on with false narratives surrounding Republicans’ alternate electors meeting in December 2020, we are setting the record straight. Republican electors met in order to preserve legal options while lawsuits were still outstanding. Democrats know this, but they’re feigning outrage in order to distract from their failed record. While the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel today wrote a clickbait in hopes of creating drama surrounding the “secrecy” of the meeting, they neglected to include the fact that WisGOP officials were speaking with reporters from the outlet in real-time, which we reminded them of in our official statement. Of course, that portion of the statement wasn’t included in the story. The Republican Party of Wisconsin will continue to these false narratives and push back on Democrats’ political theater pile-on. | | Last week, Wisconsinites celebrated National School Choice Week! Since Governor Tommy Thompson launched the modern school choice movement, Wisconsin has boasted a proud history of supporting educational choice, which creates better outcomes for students and expands opportunities for success. Today, over 48,000 Wisconsin children benefit from school choice – allowing students of all backgrounds to obtain a quality education. You can read our full statement , and if you are interested in participating in one of Wisconsin’s school choice programs, you can check your eligibility and apply on behalf of your child . Last week, Milwaukee was struck by yet another horrific act of violence after a sheriff’s deputy was shot following a traffic stop. Tragically, this is only the most recent event in a two-year crime spike, as the city once again set a record for homicides in 2021. Meanwhile, Tony Evers is missing in action. After his performative press conference on violence prevention in Milwaukee last October that was interrupted by gunfire, Evers has been mum on rising crime while Wisconsin communities continue to suffer. Wisconsinites deserve a governor who will truly stand up for public safety – not throw arbitrary dollar amounts on a press release. ---|---|--- | | Want to help stand up for conservative principles in your community? Submit a Letter to the Editor! You can send a letter directly to your local paper by filling out the form on our . ---|---|--- In Case You Missed It... In 2018, Tony Evers said that “flip-flopping” is not a “great re-election strategy.” Nonetheless, Tony Evers proposed the same child tax credit policy that he opposed while running for governor in 2018. Try as Evers might to explain that “this is not a re-election thing,” despite the fact that he opposed this very policy until his re-election year, Wisconsinites see the truth behind his sudden change of heart. Kamala Harris is trying to play damage control for Joe Biden’s disastrous first year in office. If Harris spent more time addressing the border crisis, working to lower prices, or fixing the crippled supply chain and less time on photo opps, perhaps the Biden administration’s approval rating would be better than 33 percent. Worth the Read | | ---|---|--- Top Sharable Content**

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8428%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=OZCg0e18tQAMk3xTeh%2bJCA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UE9bCvsF9qikS2wZ5VIERA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kJhOHtyo%2fWiy3PtGsSaewA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rg20sAYfiwZoSl4jPOCooA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z775q2f3cbl86nb820au93vpbnbuqru2sd63uhjg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicborcdhj6jhm9d5j6pqn4phimtjmdc5mmlg79c3hmthm6d3jc6om2c72cmp6dcb7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbc37m9p6cdb4mmpmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gm0or2c5im6oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgsu4jfh15alreqk98ssd6qancsfrggvbs5ki7m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob5cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcfb3jeet0fucmh1eg0b8vbuasd0ihatt9gtdkeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob5cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhf9ln13ev5clj7d013u7k0m4js707ljm7sff2e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob5cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. name: ICYMI News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zscvbhmghg5f1r474202clut6q85d67cuch7ei30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo7ecb0s4ondcrmmkobatjncjin0t9j6eob4opiesoe2o726jhr2pr5epp64spn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbc37m9p6cdb2mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gm0or2c5j6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6dirjn0d628aqo0no0ee6avhg354vdca8d6drq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd0s5gdsvfjhhb8q0ih3627cv8ldu2kdk0lfpqlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob6clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb48qnlmj4f57s7b6vsc5r2h81ckpllc2ta70298_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1hm4ob6clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
subject: You only have until 11:59 PM to continue your support streak Your continued membership streak is at risk. Renew before it’s too late >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>> [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6782%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Toc%2fuZflf3VGjRs1MLt8hQ&sysid=1)
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>>

| |
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69836%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iXBdAeVHIVwrJCC2mMb5Dw&sysid=1)**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69837%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BUO7BR%2b3u8DdCVhPvJbxvg&sysid=1)**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69838%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ct0mjMNXuF%2ffx8bJBzLXSg&sysid=1)
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69839%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qsci95J9sbStfNq%2fda91oA&sysid=1)
---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69830%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xPcPigFutlAPaUCLupQOUQ&sysid=1)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/2022-membership-expired/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20220201_PWG-GAU2.103101_mark-2022-membership-services_t1138557-573&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=PWG-GAU2.103101&utm_content=20220201_we-hate-to-see-you-go.GAU-20220205)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69831%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wsn7sWNu36lUkJYlCDEVMQ&sysid=1)

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69832%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D5B5R2Dl75xd2abzHMGG8A&sysid=1)**

name: Emily Seidel
subject: The 10 biggest lies of socialism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | |
---
Hey there, Right now, the demand for socialism is on the rise. That's especially true among young people. Unfortunately, many of them have bought into the empty promises of socialism because of political leaders like Bernie Sanders and AOC. That's why my policy research team has put together an easy-to-read guide that identifies the most common lies promoted by socialists and the truth of what typically follows from it once implemented. We're about to launch a large-scale educational effort to get this free resource into the hands of many young Americans to open their hearts and minds and start the conversation to persuade them towards freedom.
---
| | **That's why I'm emailing you today.** I was hoping to get your feedback on how we can improve the eBook before the campaign is launched. You can get your free copy of _10 Biggest Lies of Socialism_ to review here now:[http://americansforprosperity.org/10-biggest-lies-of-socialism-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0xMGxpZXNvZnNvY2lhbGlzbSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MS1BRV9GRk8wMjA1MjAyMiJ9/Z24TyuZ1Gol4MnWkVgsFzQ)

Emily Seidel
President and CEO
Americans for Prosperity

| | | Fellow Conservative,

I know I've reached out a lot lately, but this is important.

It’s Marco, I missed my FIRST goal of the year–this could set me back months. We can’t afford this in an election year.

I want to say that I hate begging you for help, but this is so important. The Senate majority is on the line, the fate of America hangs in the balance, **and my opponent just reported she raised over $7 million last quarter.** I’ll do whatever necessary to make sure that Conservatives take back the Senate this election.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
The truth is, Ron DeSantis has been chasing far-right policies |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41454407/328885841/409518039?refcode=20220205_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVjMGIxYi05MDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14yjhesxBXoXn7K9TxB0jgWl3UtCT_KI1X9hvCQEZLo=)
---
Friend,

Back in 2009, I was proud to welcome President Obama to Florida to tout the benefits, like high speed rail, the stimulus package was going to bring to our state. I’m proud of that moment, and of all the work we did with the Obama administration while I was governor to improve peoples’ lives and get Florida back on track during the Great Recession.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41454408/328885842/409518039?refcode=20220205_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVjMGIxYi05MDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14yjhesxBXoXn7K9TxB0jgWl3UtCT_KI1X9hvCQEZLo=)
---
But right now, I’m worried about Florida under Ron DeSantis. As scary as it sounds, he just doesn’t care about people. He cares about looking forward to 2024 and chasing whatever extreme, hot-button issue he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president.

That’s why he’s spent so much of his time chasing divisive far-right policies rather than combating COVID-19 and climate change. And it’s why so much of his campaign’s money is coming from billionaires who live out of state and have virtually no connection to Florida.

The truth is Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. Now I’m running for governor to be the people’s voice in Tallahassee and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians. But I’m going to need your help to do it.

**[If you’re with me, please pitch in anything you can now. Together, I know we can defeat Governor DeSantis and restore common sense, opportunity, and decency to our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41454409/328885843/409518039?refcode=20220205_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWVjMGIxYi05MDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14yjhesxBXoXn7K9TxB0jgWl3UtCT_KI1X9hvCQEZLo=)**

clean_body: The truth is, Ron DeSantis has been chasing far-right policies | | | | = Friend, Back in 2009, I was proud to welcome President Obama to Florida to tout the benefits, like high speed rail, the stimulus package was going to bring to our state. I’m proud of that moment, and of all the work we did with the Obama administration while I was governor to improve peoples’ lives and get Florida back on track during the Great Recession. = But right now, I’m worried about Florida under Ron DeSantis. As scary as it sounds, he just doesn’t care about people. He cares about looking forward to 2024 and chasing whatever extreme, hot-button issue he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president. That’s why he’s spent so much of his time chasing divisive far-right policies rather than combating COVID-19 and climate change. And it’s why so much of his campaign’s money is coming from billionaires who live out of state and have virtually no connection to Florida. The truth is Ron DeSantis has failed Florida. Now I’m running for governor to be the people’s voice in Tallahassee and finally start building a Florida that works for ALL Floridians. But I’m going to need your help to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. # It's an incredible honor to receive support from the [Retired Law Enforcement Officers of Idaho](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010XSrRuVs-zQ85mXwnF1GI9erdkFVRGPQu7zK4Qhg_zyS0zO6hnTw7gUz_0UeQDEMlV-vrG0IbCruQ66EGbq_Z0r1yUVmiagJb4Bw9hll659wu2-xtB2y-NYww9E0vLKX9yiRc0y2R_Uq0iiRjxz9-T_F1d0AFlUJ-AJrwrGKCIVvFlsrzMqz4ydnyhaxEg-xWm-OVdSOFOpqtW75qlWfXiSikuG1aTgZuOETLd4rxZVqhgwDMiBWK4KSqaz7Fpf24J1TI9BMVtM2OWaRId6RjU9XxlA9PsJSan4_ioKBwFpRX6HO3MQIYg7U4hcMxA2lFDeQdj5Hy7VyDMEQBLYRT2Ex0Xg7vAPVzC9I7mS6J9JKVLRQt3fPBRqmY7lzTF3FWrAri3s7XO6sKUAZ2S09AmQHrBFkVybv&c=3OKuDW2JHt1eFSuLgQ3PT38h5gEHc_T6zdVp5HkJEeIBe7oZn29lKA==&ch=SG9GxIA-3VKQ27wdwRsrSTxOPtY92uE6lYrCeNoPGCym3XyJ9ElUAQ==),
# Code 3 to 1.
## Backing the Blue must be more than a political buzzword,
## it's about creating strong communities that embrace family values.
## I won't let you down. Thank you again for this honor.
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

body:
Team,
Nevada Republican Jim Marchant is joining up with other far-right Secretary of State candidates across the country to try to overturn the last election. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_020522_1]
Don’t just listen to us – Marchant will tell you in his own words!

Hi friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign – but first, let me explain why your support is so critical:
* More money has been spent attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat this cycle

* If I lose here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate

* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection

* We can't win without your support

It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, my team and I will need as much help as we can get. **[That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask: Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to keep this seat and our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41460801/328905225/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk630-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmI5YTExNi05Nzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Zg1v0_5l3T32hpd-xaIAt1dBeGByT65cTMfv4sHXU8=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41460805/328905229/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk630-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmI5YTExNi05Nzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Zg1v0_5l3T32hpd-xaIAt1dBeGByT65cTMfv4sHXU8=)
---
**Republicans have spent over $7 million attacking me, but our resources to fight back are limited.** This will be one of the most closely watched races of the year and if our support wavers, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor.
I know we can win this race, but it will take an army of grassroots support from people like you, friend. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help reach our goal and keep this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41460808/328905233/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk630-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmI5YTExNi05Nzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Zg1v0_5l3T32hpd-xaIAt1dBeGByT65cTMfv4sHXU8=)**

name: John James
subject: This isn’t a myth—I should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notーbecause I’m not a career politician, and I have zero
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2df2cc35cdfplcfacpd2jr218vst8o2ugiqh14g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onle9jb5cb36oqb8o3lclgjcsb1cmqn1d1he9o69o9m6dj6dcjh6go74sj569gr1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4d366hhbbd1nmpgmcc9gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjoahplhnn27d38smajacfnfpjgqim22o89h79go_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs) | |
---
Hi Co-Pilot,

Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー _because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington._
I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger.

At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in _Operation Iraqi Freedom_ , leading two Apache platoons.

After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zra54gsf6t3ln6ufs1njflshk6atffilestg2830_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrhpil4ignvf28m74dkmtu6okdmp7orrshdaq69o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
I went to work in our family's automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, _where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country._

You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from _slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation._
**Only in the United States of America is that possible! **

These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors.

Co-Pilot, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and **I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in.**

We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington._
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh7u3kc2ac47fsg7k8us60e1iom0dopdops9sh0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
We are at what President Reagan referred to as _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.
**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**
**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**

**Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours**.

**[Co-Pilot, send this Combat Veteran to Congress, and I’ll fight with everything I possess to preserve the American Dream >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt7ejjdiq491fk094hi2e1t0009t0koog6lfhloo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)**
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $10**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjg1i536h3a09elflvo3880ij1mabeutaq5og0eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3lu1iud8745s84ls05gkojgvn3meuh5ovat2rpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8i5fis2b78l3mkddv519s6q02122f78m8qjhokg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zonpgt169frbvn7rkgkgsb5oa4aof64168sg33v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4v9583gn9gtg3mdv78qpdfcbsubturlcchuclfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
Thank you,
John James
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcgfc8c2ehm30sld3qnbskqkjbkqpkusemjpb068_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1jmao34cdh2bs)
---

name: Laura Neuman
subject: The first female Governor of Maryland
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41463626/328916211/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWZkYmVhYy05Yzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MeRBtxYzVlf4CI1jkaB3zpIp9-KWJqnohGcOlJA0cxI=)

| | See this little girl, Peter? She’s me – and I never thought that one day I’d be running to become the first female Governor of Maryland. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41463627/328916213/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220205_FR_Throwback_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWZkYmVhYy05Yzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MeRBtxYzVlf4CI1jkaB3zpIp9-KWJqnohGcOlJA0cxI=) I had a tough childhood, and so many opportunities were out of reach. Going to school and getting a good job seemed like an impossible feat, let alone running for the highest office in the state of Maryland. I was born and raised in East Baltimore, starting out in Baltimore City Public Schools. I often took the bus to the library to escape my tumultuous home life – it was the only place I could learn about a world beyond my own. By high school, I thought education would be my path to a new life, and I begged my parents to send me to a better school in the county – but the bus didn’t run that far and, after only one year, I was forced to drop out of high school. When I turned 18, I escaped my abusive home with all of my belongings in a trash bag. I lived out of my car while I saved my waitressing money for the down payment on an apartment. Two weeks after moving in, an intruder raped me at gunpoint. No one believed me. Not the police. Not even my own mother. The police didn’t investigate my case until _19 years later._ They found my assailant in three days. Despite all of this, I persevered, and I managed to get accepted into an MBA program. From there, I became an entrepreneur helping struggling businesses, and then a county executive. But, my past stuck with me. I couldn’t help but wonder what my life would have been like if more opportunities were available to me when I was growing up. And that’s a huge part of why I’m running for governor – I want to provide folks with all the opportunities I was denied growing up. I want people to know that, just because they started out in a certain circumstance, doesn’t mean that’s where they have to end up. **[If you’re with me, will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign today? I need to stay on track for my February fundraising goal if I want to have a shot at breaking through this crowded primary race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41463628/328916215/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220205_FR_Throwback_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWZkYmVhYy05Yzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MeRBtxYzVlf4CI1jkaB3zpIp9-KWJqnohGcOlJA0cxI=)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41463629/328916216/902423312?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220205_FR_Throwback_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWZkYmVhYy05Yzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MeRBtxYzVlf4CI1jkaB3zpIp9-KWJqnohGcOlJA0cxI=)

clean_body: | = | | See this little girl, Peter? She’s me – and I never thought that one day I’d be running to become the first female Governor of Maryland. = I had a tough childhood, and so many opportunities were out of reach. Going to school and getting a good job seemed like an impossible feat, let alone running for the highest office in the state of Maryland. I was born and raised in East Baltimore, starting out in Baltimore City Public Schools. I often took the bus to the library to escape my tumultuous home life – it was the only place I could learn about a world beyond my own. By high school, I thought education would be my path to a new life, and I begged my parents to send me to a better school in the county – but the bus didn’t run that far and, after only one year, I was forced to drop out of high school. When I turned 18, I escaped my abusive home with all of my belongings in a trash bag. I lived out of my car while I saved my waitressing money for the down payment on an apartment. Two weeks after moving in, an intruder raped me at gunpoint. No one believed me. Not the police. Not even my own mother. The police didn’t investigate my case until 19 years later. They found my assailant in three days. Despite all of this, I persevered, and I managed to get accepted into an MBA program. From there, I became an entrepreneur helping struggling businesses, and then a county executive. But, my past stuck with me. I couldn’t help but wonder what my life would have been like if more opportunities were available to me when I was growing up. And that’s a huge part of why I’m running for governor – I want to provide folks with all the opportunities I was denied growing up. I want people to know that, just because they started out in a certain circumstance, doesn’t mean that’s where they have to end up. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Laura | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | By Authority: Laura Neuman for Governor, Carlton G. Epps Sr., Treasurer Laura Neuman for Governor PO Box 806 Baltimore, MD 21203

name: Team Bracy
subject: URGENT - The far-right is winning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter —

Randolph is running for Congress because he believes in our democracy. He believes in making policy that makes a difference for working families. And he believes that public servants should do just that — serve the public.

But heaven knows there are too many politicians nowadays who can’t say the same thing — far-right politicians whose only purpose is to stall progress, sow division, and weaken our democratic institutions.

Now, here’s the bad news, Peter: right now, those far-right politicians are winning. Last quarter, they out-raised Democrats by MILLIONS OF DOLLARS.

We can’t let them win, Peter. We can’t let them win back the majority; we can’t let them undo all of the progress we’ve made; and we certainly can’t let them succeed next time they try to overturn a free and fair election.

If we’re going to keep our majority and keep the far-right out of power, we need to win this race. Randolph is fighting like hell to keep this seat blue, but he can’t do it without you. Can you chip in right now to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0205fr]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Bracy

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

* * *

Peter,
**Seeing a doctor or picking up a prescription should never break the bank. That’s why Roy has spent years fighting to expand Medicaid to North Carolinians who need it.**
_But Republicans have blocked those efforts at every turn._
Expanding Medicaid would make health insurance accessible for _over 620,000_ people in our state — that’s single parents who are struggling to make ends meet, older folks on a reduced income, or a young couple who are underemployed and struggling to find more work.
38 states and the District of Columbia have already expanded Medicaid because they _know_ it’s the right thing to do to keep their people healthy.
**[Now, Roy wants your input: Do you support expanding Medicaid in North Carolina, Peter? Take our one-question poll right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41463798/328916704/-1666234827?refcode=ea.46fdbeac-9c86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.46fdbeac-9c86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmZkYmVhYy05Yzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jCl3679-U0T424o8iMm573mdlkMexGURCZqHdh8DndQ=&emci=630451a7-2485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=46fdbeac-9c86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)**

subject: Sen. Grassley's RECORD-LOW approval ratings

body:
You need to know this:
| | | Peter – my opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) rallied with Donald Trump here in Iowa, where he accepted the former president's endorsement. Now more than ever, I need your support if we're truly going to defeat Sen. Grassley and flip this seat blue. **Here's what you need to know:**
---
**First,** we have unprecedented momentum in Iowa: Reporting from The Des Moines Register revealed Sen. Grassley is at his lowest APPROVAL rating in nearly two decades – and an Iowa pollster went on record saying Sen. Grassley's standing right now is _weak._
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley, even when he's vulnerable, will take unprecedented resources: He's backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies who have more than $32 million _in the bank_ to protect Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now** my team and I need to raise another $8,000 before midnight tonight. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is the only way we can defeat Sen. Grassley and defend our Democratic Senate majority in the process.
**[Please, donate $5 or more now – whatever you can spare to fuel our fight against Sen. Grassley when he's vulnerable – so we can win in Iowa and protect our Democratic Senate majority. Every donation gets us one step closer to expanding Senate control _and_ getting working Iowans the leadership they deserve!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464353/328919226/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk666-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzFkZTc1ZC05ZDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4r34nx0AuXr-IBA_rTVQwt-5R8GV_dxviSir5PTc8Qk=)**

SUPER PAC DUMPS $30 MILLION INTO ADS BEFORE MIDTERMS**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fqcr-1wr6p-4qqlpo2/)
---

We hate to be the bearer of bad news, but this is _catastrophic_.

Not only is your 2022 Membership **EXPIRED** , but an Obama-Clinton backed Super PAC is spending **$30 Million** of corrupt dark money on ads to SMEAR our House Republicans!

Republican candidates in battleground states don't stand a chance against this flood of liberal cash unless committed patriots like you help them fight back.

This is urgent. So urgent that we have activated an extended deadline until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. With **$30 million** going into the Democrats’ pockets, we are desperate to catch up.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fqcr-1wr6t-4qqlpo6/ "RENEW NOW")
---

The Corrupt Democrats will do anything to remain in power. That means relying on an unprecedented amount of dark money to fuel battleground races across the county.

We cannot let the Radical Left's Super PACs control this country.

**[Polling in battleground races like these show that there will be a fight to the finish. Don't let the Left's deep pockets of corrupt money turn the tide in their favor.")**

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fqcr-1wr6v-4qqlpo8/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fqcr-1wr6w-4qqlpo9/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Team King for Maryland
subject: Trump is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
61% of Maryland Republicans do not believe that Joe Biden was legitimately elected president.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464941/328921972/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=)
---
| Peter, did you see this news? **A new poll found that 61% of Maryland Republicans do not believe that Joe Biden was legitimately elected president.** The divide is widening not only between Democrats and Republicans, but between reality and Donald Trump’s ‘Big Lie’. And it’s about to get worse. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464942/328921973/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=) **The poll also found that Republicans are much more likely to support Dan Cox, an extremist conservative candidate, if they are told about his big endorsement from Donald Trump.** Cox not only attended the Trump rally that led to the deadly Capitol riot on January 6th, but he even arranged tour buses for the insurrectionists. And when the elected officials at the Capitol were at risk of being overtaken by an armed mob, and lives were being taken, Dan Cox tweeted that Vice President Mike Pence was a “traitor.”
---
| [CHIP IN TO FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464943/328921974/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=)
---
It’s clear that Trump is still the Republican leader, and he has already tapped Dan Cox to continue his toxic and backwards agenda. _**[Will you help us make sure that Trump’s favorite candidate doesn’t become the next governor of Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464944/328921975/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=)**_ Our state is at risk of having this dangerous insurrectionist as its leader. We cannot afford to have Trump 2.0 leading our state. Maryland needs to move forward, not backwards. But in order to keep Cox out of the top office, we need to ensure John has the resources to win. _**[If you have a moment, can you contribute $50, $25, or even $5 right now to stand up to extremists like Dan Cox and Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464945/328921976/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=)**_ Together, we can and we will keep Trumpism from spreading and hurting our state. Thank you, Team King

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41464946/328921977/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220205-b1_fr_actives-TKM_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220205&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TKM_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=9904cfc1-9e86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTA0Y2ZjMS05ZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cWsDLHY6BYeTn-670hRqcAdWsQmPGgUxMViBbuO9pY=)

clean_body: 61% of Maryland Republicans do not believe that Joe Biden was legitimately elected president. | = | Peter, did you see this news? A new poll found that 61% of Maryland Republicans do not believe that Joe Biden was legitimately elected president. The divide is widening not only between Democrats and Republicans, but between reality and Donald Trump’s ‘Big Lie’. And it’s about to get worse. = The poll also found that Republicans are much more likely to support Dan Cox, an extremist conservative candidate, if they are told about his big endorsement from Donald Trump. Cox not only attended the Trump rally that led to the deadly Capitol riot on January 6th, but he even arranged tour buses for the insurrectionists. And when the elected officials at the Capitol were at risk of being overtaken by an armed mob, and lives were being taken, Dan Cox tweeted that Vice President Mike Pence was a “traitor.” | = It’s clear that Trump is still the Republican leader, and he has already tapped Dan Cox to continue his toxic and backwards agenda. = Our state is at risk of having this dangerous insurrectionist as its leader. We cannot afford to have Trump 2.0 leading our state. Maryland needs to move forward, not backwards. But in order to keep Cox out of the top office, we need to ensure John has the resources to win. = Together, we can and we will keep Trumpism from spreading and hurting our state. name: John James
subject: This isn’t a myth—I should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notーbecause I’m not a career politician, and I have zero
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1e4ug7vinf7em7a7tv7oteol4k3dk3urinmmp38_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj5dbnmdgeatb1m4qm4s5k63hj5dj2cdj79c316mpj9pjmc9jm9p5gsdim9orgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj38ollmhjr4sb66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gm0pr0sdi69oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zin1ub0t3vced9rfe8cojf45dnmm5bkmg6ddd0qg_) | |
---
Hi Co-Pilot,

Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー _because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington._
I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger.

At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in _Operation Iraqi Freedom_ , leading two Apache platoons.

After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zebul18kmddv7tf8oq5ttgu346g15pgamph56ahg_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8sp27jio7a52rmn31bv3gtld7qg5akabkrncceg_)
I went to work in our family's automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, _where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country._

You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from _slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation._
**Only in the United States of America is that possible! **

These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors.

Co-Pilot, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and **I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in.**

We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington._
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq8mcnqq23pr3lbis4km0r09gilbe48firj4bog_)
We are at what President Reagan referred to as _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.
**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**
**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**

**Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours**.

**[Co-Pilot, send this Combat Veteran to Congress, and I’ll fight with everything I possess to preserve the American Dream >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhon2nu0picjlp9nbrum2n5o6cu00nrjtq2kkujo_)**
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $10**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdgn4733b33nqrlg60h8kpligb5fuf85pkue9jd0_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg0f76a31tv8rc0oqe901l7hvjfvhgj17gm6p4u8_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $50**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2v3kr5m8cq2mt7g3gpm8pbqfjbv0ph1am1pc9bg_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $75**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zitj642ouk9am6m88me64uuog89ts4sgr89la0ao_)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5uecrq0d89fu4b7tdl3kl7a64itgic9cc6o6cuo_)
Thank you,
John James
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb7fsnr9jaqsqvgqqrsanvpt5anl4e3nvjdfeil8_)
---
