name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: Some reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41465681/328925994/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2362-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViOWY4ZC1hMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdqFY_JVUlEp1fAVb1MX-s2MIM9CM1PxHb6EIFLB8KQ=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41465682/328925995/1804727444?refcode=jtk2362-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViOWY4ZC1hMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdqFY_JVUlEp1fAVb1MX-s2MIM9CM1PxHb6EIFLB8KQ=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41465683/328925996/1804727444?refcode=jtk2362-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViOWY4ZC1hMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdqFY_JVUlEp1fAVb1MX-s2MIM9CM1PxHb6EIFLB8KQ=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41465684/328925997/-460395862?refcode=jtk2362-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmViOWY4ZC1hMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdqFY_JVUlEp1fAVb1MX-s2MIM9CM1PxHb6EIFLB8KQ=&emci=277fe2f8-7284-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=efeb9f8d-a186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

NEWS: Greg Abbott and Beto O’Rourke fundraising numbers just released. We’ve got good news and bad news.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41465886/328926904/485391185?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220205_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlNzA3OGY1LWEyODYtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w19mzWlobMB9K9n_wHzinfRMnUWPLidKFslOTy6uWQk=) Hey Peter,

We wanted to check in because Greg Abbott just released his fundraising numbers from his end-of-year Texas Ethics Commission (TEC) report. It’s a bit of a good news, bad news situation. | **CANDIDATE** | **Raised through 12/31/21** | **Timeframe**
---|---|---
**Beto** | **$7.2 million** | **46 days**
**Greg Abbott** | **$18.9 million** | **6 months**
1. **Good news:** We’re raising money faster than Abbott. If we can accelerate the pace, we can close the gap and have a much better shot at victory.
2. **Bad news:** Greg Abbott has been in this race a much longer time. With this new money added, he now has $65 million on hand to spend.

**Peter, let us be blunt:** there are a lot of Texans who believe in what we’re doing, but they aren’t sure that we can raise the resources to get it done. They’re going to sit this one out unless we give them a reason to believe.

We need to show we can fundraise a lot faster than Abbott to give people confidence. Let’s show we can pick up the pace right now, Peter.

Joining Laurel at this event will be many special guests. Including the Chairwoman of the Arizona GOP and Laurel's dear friend, Dr. Kelli Ward.
There will be additional guests announced in the coming days but we want to make sure you receive your exclusive priority invitation now!
Tickets start as low as $25 and we hope that you can join us.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto (D)
subject: URGENT: Trump holding massive fundraiser to defeat me!
body:
Derek,

I just got word that Donald Trump is about to personally host a HUGE fundraiser for my GOP opponent at Mar-a-Lago!

I’m Donald Trump’s TOP target because I was just rated “the most vulnerable Democratic senator” – and he knows my race will determine Senate control this year. So Trump is going ALL IN on this fundraiser, flying in Lindsey Graham and countless GOP mega-donors to raise massive piles of cash for my opponent.

With polls showing me 3 points behind Trump’s candidate, Trump’s plan is to use this fundraiser to overwhelm my campaign with an avalanche of money and attack ads.

Trump’s scheme could easily surge my opponent into a huge lead, costing us this race and our Democratic Senate majority. That’s why we have to respond right now – but I’m falling short of my emergency fundraising goal to fight back with hours until the deadline!

Please, split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood to help me defend the Senate and defeat Trump's megadonor machine! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220205_CGVA_CCM]

This race is a pure toss-up, so every single dollar is going to make the difference between winning and losing.

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Senator Catherine Cortez Masto (D)
Nevada

clean_body: Derek, I just got word that Donald Trump is about to personally host a HUGE fundraiser for my GOP opponent at Mar-a-Lago! I’m Donald Trump’s TOP target because I was just rated “the most vulnerable Democratic senator” – and he knows my race will determine Senate control this year. So Trump is going ALL IN on this fundraiser, flying in Lindsey Graham and countless GOP mega-donors to raise massive piles of cash for my opponent. With polls showing me 3 points behind Trump’s candidate, Trump’s plan is to use this fundraiser to overwhelm my campaign with an avalanche of money and attack ads. Trump’s scheme could easily surge my opponent into a huge lead, costing us this race and our Democratic Senate majority. That’s why we have to respond right now – but I’m falling short of my emergency fundraising goal to fight back with hours until the deadline! Please, split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood to help me defend the Senate and defeat Trump's megadonor machine! >> [] This race is a pure toss-up, so every single dollar is going to make the difference between winning and losing. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Senator Catherine Cortez Masto (D) Nevada Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: .

name: Tim
subject: brrr
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2246%2E3611125%2E3PORK8 ][IMG]

Brrr, folks—

There might be snow all across Ohio, but that hasn’t stopped us! My
morning routine has recently become waking up at 5AM in -10 degree cold to
hit the campaign trail.

But hey, that’s what you do when you’re running for the Senate. I’m
getting up early, hearing directly from Ohioans, and working hard to earn
everybody’s vote. Because that’s how we’ll win this race.

But unfortunately, I’ve got some bad news. My team tells me February is
starting off real slow. And we could use your help in raising $10,000 over
the next two days to get back on track.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7235?t=1007&akid=2246%2E3611125%2E3PORK8 ]Can you chip in right now toward our $10,000 goal? Listen, anything you
give will help us deliver a crushing blow to Mitch McConnell’s hopes of
reclaiming the majority. Sounds like a pretty good deal if you ask me.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7236?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2246%2E3611125%2E3PORK8 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7236?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2246%2E3611125%2E3PORK8 ]Donate $50

My team just told me if we leave soon we’ll have time to stop for coffee.
So, I gotta run.

Thanks!

Tim

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: They will stop at nothing to take away our vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We are being stripped of our voting rights and the time to fight is NOW.

Just last week, the PA courts backed up power-hungry, democracy-loathing legislators who want to get rid of a new state law that makes it easier for us to mail in our ballots. While the Governor said he'd appeal the decision to ensure no-excuse mail-in voting, it's clear that we're going to have to step up to fight this onslaught of relentless attacks on our democratic process.

Looking at this dreary news, it's clear:

- It is incredibly necessary to elect judges who respect democracy. The courts will also soon be deciding our redistricting map and hopefully redraw fair legislative lines.
- Those seeking to invalidate our votes in the midterm elections are on the offensive, so we need to be proactive in our efforts.
- We need to organize communities to rise up ASAP to register and educate voters to protect their votes and to tell lawmakers that we won't let them take away our rights!

Attacks on our democracy are VERY REAL in this battleground state. DEMAND your legislators do THEIR JOB to protect our very precious right to vote by clicking below.

ACT NOW [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/protect-our-right-to-vote/]Thank you for standing up for democracy,

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: AZ Battleground HQ
subject: We’re in for an uphill battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Team, will you join us in the fight?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467572/328935270/20675432?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.02.05_b1_azbhq_all-nd&refcode2=16526fcf-a986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjUyNmZjZi1hOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCWTSj_-Q3H031T2_mm8VHhwkntiZwiuCJm2HLgz3zE=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467659/328935689/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=) Eddie Geller here. Sometimes climate change keeps me awake at night.

This sounds like the start of a joke, but I’m not kidding. I really, really do worry about our future. What kind of world will we leave to the next generation?

[Because — despite what my opponent Scott Franklin says — the climate crisis is here. Seas are rising. Extreme weather is getting more frequent. **And we’re running out of time to stop it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467660/328935690/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=) | | | [DEFEND OUR FUTURE - CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467661/328935691/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=)

Here in my central Florida district, we are already feeling the impacts of our changing climate. Temperatures and extreme weather events have increased steadily over the last 30 years — [ and it’s just getting worse.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467663/328935693/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467664/328935694/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=)
And according to scientists (aka the folks I trust on this issue), temperatures are only going to continue to rise. Our climate is like a runaway train and the tracks are ending soon!

[That’s why this race is so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467665/328935695/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=) My opponent Scott Franklin is a climate change denier and takes big money from the same corporate special interests fueling the climate crisis. Until we vote out anti-science politicians like Rep. Franklin, our climate crisis will only get more dire.

And we’re running out of time (hence the existential dread). If we don’t take urgent, bold action on climate, the world we leave for our children will be a MUCH different place.

[Can you chip in $5 to help flip FL-15 so we can FINALLY take urgent action on climate change before it’s too late? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467666/328935696/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220205_FR_DREAD_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjdmZTAzNi1hYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NmdukJllCa7ED4foNFQIZEVXisQ9wdxMFutPDBLIU74=)

clean_body: | | | = Eddie Geller here. Sometimes climate change keeps me awake at night. This sounds like the start of a joke, but I’m not kidding. I really, really do worry about our future. What kind of world will we leave to the next generation? = | | | = | | = Here in my central Florida district, we are already feeling the impacts of our changing climate. Temperatures and extreme weather events have increased steadily over the last 30 years — = = And according to scientists (aka the folks I trust on this issue), temperatures are only going to continue to rise. Our climate is like a runaway train and the tracks are ending soon! = My opponent Scott Franklin is a climate change denier and takes big money from the same corporate special interests fueling the climate crisis. Until we vote out anti-science politicians like Rep. Franklin, our climate crisis will only get more dire. And we’re running out of time (hence the existential dread). If we don’t take urgent, bold action on climate, the world we leave for our children will be a MUCH different place. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for helping defeat anti-science, climate change denier Scott Franklin. subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467970/328936817/1927938479?refcode=20220205_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjM5OGMwYi1hYzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VN4BKDmvsqaZj_ZJnqeu3kpEnMQx-6yEaowr4v5T3e4=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the fundraising deadline comes to an end? I would not ask if it weren’t so important. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467971/328936818/1927938479?refcode=20220205_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjM5OGMwYi1hYzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VN4BKDmvsqaZj_ZJnqeu3kpEnMQx-6yEaowr4v5T3e4=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41467972/328936819/-1534947712?refcode=20220205_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjM5OGMwYi1hYzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VN4BKDmvsqaZj_ZJnqeu3kpEnMQx-6yEaowr4v5T3e4=)
Thank you, —Mark

Premier Energy Group Supports Brett Guillory
| | | | |

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xjpnIEPZxqMQ7y-lZ5u02K7ZCg0s3Dh6DN9xN1MPE3MDgUKuLILqzw_GEPLvC_gRZOjo9fA0PIAOSX7ulnhudthAoKDlPGvV_Rjiiwd1ZlkWzWIvF8ZWCyi_R-eTSirukmyieDnIOYhIA7xElpAtapqeESjjAdBuHnlHUMn6muo=&c=l2k630XkTDd8K3ZfsyMvaO4NMBasAD-ydDDkG28vGnSSM_l4ntAVrg==&ch=BE1P-5hZ1yOxQBBa54BsabqnOmJf2SFdjJTatiuDumJBjBEW-gI09A==)

| Dear Neighbor,
I am proud to announce that I have received the endorsement of the Oil & Gas Workers Association ([OGWA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xjpnIEPZxqMQ7y-lZ5u02K7ZCg0s3Dh6DN9xN1MPE3MDgUKuLILqz8w_3Vqd4K7DSzlgD-1410fZIv-ErJGrR--QuC-e6AnR0IENxIXUdy7DYh3LjbzT1W7CPzQPBk72tAOFcNElsOfgBKv5ah6m0g==&c=l2k630XkTDd8K3ZfsyMvaO4NMBasAD-ydDDkG28vGnSSM_l4ntAVrg==&ch=BE1P-5hZ1yOxQBBa54BsabqnOmJf2SFdjJTatiuDumJBjBEW-gI09A==)) for U.S. Congress.
---
---
Living in Texas, we know that the oil and gas industry is not only important to the energy independence of our nation, but it is also the lifeblood of both our state and Houston's economy. OGWA is dedicated to securing, growing, and sustaining oil & gas jobs for the American worker, while actively working to promote and ensure American oil and energy independence. The organization has over 45,000 members and is regarded as the leading oil and gas workers association in the country.
I'm proud to have the endorsement of an organization whose work has such a great and positive impact on my country, my state, and my city. It's an honor to have their support in the fight to regain our energy independence and to ensure both job security and opportunity for my neighbors who are members of the oil and gas community.
---
---

name: Derek Marshall
subject: We have a duty to protect our world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**2021 broke a lot of records, and we need to talk about why: climate change.** It’s perhaps the greatest existential threat to our global society, but also to millions of other species and the environments we call home. **The world we live in is under threat, and it’s up to people like us to do something about it.** There are still those who mock and deny, who dismiss and downplay the extreme challenges climate change poses. **(Yes, they are generally known as Republicans.)**
I’m running against a Republican just like that. **When he was an Assembly member in California, my opponent Jay Obernolte was given a lifetime score of just 9% for his environmental voting record.** He voted against a diverse range of pro-environment legislation, including those that created climate mitigation plans, broadened environmental justice measures, ensured sustainable water management, informed consumers about toxic chemicals, and protected farm workers. **In other words, his voting record scorned any and all environmental issues on the table. **
I live in the high desert in California, where extreme wildfires and drought have become the new normal. **Our communities deserve a representative who cares about our home, protects our precious environment, and invests in a sustainable future.** Unfortunately, that’s not the representative we have. [_**I’m running to change that. Will you support my campaign today with a donation so I can maintain a strong footing against this Trump-backed Republican?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468117/328937710/-2106432180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWE5NDk3MS1hZDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FA21K2bfPN1qvrczt55dfnean0-8J5-J2xrMUmhjErM=)

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468126/328937715/-2106432180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWE5NDk3MS1hZDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FA21K2bfPN1qvrczt55dfnean0-8J5-J2xrMUmhjErM=)**

As a Member of Congress, Obernolte hasn’t performed much better. **Even though he sits on the House Committee for Natural Resources, his votes show he isn’t all too interested in protecting and conserving our nation’s natural resources.** He’s already voted against an act that would clean up chemicals out of waterways, and one that would establish new infrastructure for water management.**In other words, legislation that I would never in a million years oppose, because I understand the importance of keeping our environment safe, so we all benefit. **
It’s time for California’s 23rd congressional district to make a change, a big one. It’s time for an unapologetic progressive Democrat to represent our district in the halls of Congress, someone who will fight for our home and defend our communities. **We need a leader who is prepared for the 21st century challenges we face like climate change.** I believe I am that leader. **[But in order to win, I need your help. Every donation we receive helps build our resources and our momentum against my Republican opponent. Can I count on you to contribute today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468133/328937725/-2106432180?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWE5NDk3MS1hZDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FA21K2bfPN1qvrczt55dfnean0-8J5-J2xrMUmhjErM=)**
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Fellow Conservative, What if I told you we have a chance to... ...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate? ...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia? ...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate? What if I told you we can do ALL THREE? That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker. From crushing it on the college and professional football fields to owning a successful business and being a spokesman for an organization that provides mental health services for our troops, Herschel Walker has done just about everything. Now, he's taking on his next challenge and facing his biggest race yet by running for Senate. We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraising senator in the entire country. In fact, he raised $9.8 million in the past three months alone! If we're going to help Herschel win in Georgia and flip the Senate Majority red, he's going to need the critical resources to fund his campaign. That's where you and I come in. My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| In 2022, when we take back the majority in the House, we're going to get a majority worth having - one that will conduct dogged oversight and hold the corrupt D.C. Swamp accountable!
[With your support, we ARE going to take back power this year.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i7WRq-dCLK57AKqWhVRjfwHqaRQbMyzoyg-gLHnYx9BE8ZOWp2PyR8XrUr8tf9vuPJsb-nyd7GN4pFpE8c_1cAQgoIMb5dlgjEYZBLl1P5W0Y-324sTRlEs_HoPQ14jGPpypjwRcAtAs3WtPU44Hs0fYrQRtHDoA_7Xd2r1bQDjRDUBoJwFzklTv_taDSCOl&c=55maQxzLA6cIjigF_mbKf28MI1AqqUdSr9i9sQxXnGLFcOhzLmVnwA==&ch=Hc0KkkbdaO3xGLeaYsHrLmIIte6mGN7C20WNPcGxJTUp0rMCwoMi5Q==)

It's going to be the days of myself and Marjorie Taylor Greene (and Speaker Donald Trump?) fighting back against the regime!
Make an investment in winning back that America First majority today!

[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeml4ko1cpvai0e4qjimf5544a5a5bbnrs7cba58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj3m9rb0t5mm9gn1djlm5ojccj269q78chhmqr64dbksqrjapr0murr4tdks4rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phkcsqj4ptmclj3ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znh0v3ga1m1rkdjbcpq6c25ujg43ajdlob1kivro_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2rs332o61qmovp80i9fqgbkuvvpt95rus16n96o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztlqanjoovrv555co87t51l0b0v2v89rtdppups0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbgvuqijn8ldcuvnu4mo363sbku1sf7pisi0q6gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8on03icq0irvo3lg4muu7cdvkdb4m3d9om1kv2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdk713eh71shncuf48ibsri769d0sog48bihs9fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpgpi72ltbn2bvfpfda6trtgegdl7bc6bpf1ldio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z361gifrcrh5os373jf0nhj1dkcon9c9ip0f2rig_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4e3rks33kmsm7vdgin7qdabcurkpd7d81cjpjv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7bc7v0cggcsu5k13p52qpbse981iugct0nhp608_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ge2o35c5h2bs)

CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN**

Less than 100 copies of my book, _Do What you Said You Would Do: Fighting for Freedom in the Swamp_ remain and you have yet to reserve yours.
**ONLY 97 SIGNED COPIES REMAINING!**

---

Patriots left and right are lining up to read about the do what you said you would mentality in the Trump White House. **Why aren't you one of them?**

**[With very few signed copies left, it is essential that you chip in $35 or more and claim your exclusive copy of my book ASAP>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fr8e-1wrkc-4qqlpo7/ "With very few signed copies left, it is essential that you chip in $35 or more and claim your exclusive copy of my book ASAP >>>")**

That’s why I have set aside a book just for **you** – but like I mentioned. I can’t hold onto it forever.
**ONLY 97 SIGNED COPIES REMAINING!**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR BOOK](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fr8e-1wrkd-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---
**HOLD EXPIRES IN 1 HOUR**
Again, this offer is time-sensitive. You must act immediately. I can’t hold your copy for very long as patriots are fighting over these books to get an inside look. **[Chip in NOW to support House Conservatives and I’ll send you a SIGNED copy of my must-read book>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fr8e-1wrke-4qqlpo9/ "Chip in NOW to support House Conservatives and I’ll send you a SIGNED copy of my must-read book >>>")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

body:
I hope you’ll take the time to read this. | | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468906/328941142/-2096412469?refcode=xxxxxxxx_em_fr_x_template_x&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
---
| Listen, this is a long email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll take the time to read it. I’m going to lay out the facts and tell you why I need to raise $12,934 before my FIRST weekly deadline of February in 24 hours. [**_If you don’t have time, I completely understand – but please chip in $27 to my campaign before go >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468907/328941143/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
* * *
**FACT:** My campaign has been making waves throughout Pennsylvania and across the country. | [**_Pittsburgh Post-Gazette:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468908/328941144/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
Jerry Dickinson wants a new progressive energy in Washington [**_NPR:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468909/328941145/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
Dickinson raised over $450,000 in 2021, all has come from individual donors [**_Brand New Congress:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468910/328941146/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
Jerry is running a bold progressive campaign to fight for the working families of Pittsburgh
---

Everyday, more people are noticing how special this campaign is, and they’re more fired up than ever to elect a progressive champion to Congress.
But people will also be watching to see if my grassroots momentum can hold up, so I need your support to keep my people-powered campaign as competitive as ever.
**Look, all eyes are on Pennsylvania to see if we can come out on top. Please, can you chip in $27 before my first February deadline tomorrow?**
[**_CHIP IN $27 OR ANYTHING YOU CAN TO SEND ME TO CONGRESS >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468914/328941147/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
* * *
**FACT:** PA-18 is an OPEN and SAFE blue seat. We have an unprecedented opportunity to elect a bold progressive in this race.
The GOP has done everything in their power to gerrymander districts across Pennsylvania and ruin Democrats’ chances of keeping the majority in Congress.
But PA-18 is a secure, Democratic seat without an incumbent running for reelection.
**Listen, this is our chance to make the GOP’s gerrymandering backfire and elect their worst nightmare: a progressive fighter who will _end_ their far-right agenda.**
But to win this race, I need the funds to keep my campaign on the move and meet with every single voter across the district before Election Day in a few months.
[**_In a race like this, every dollar counts, so I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in $27 and get me to my goal before tomorrow’s fundraising deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468918/328941155/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
* * *
**FACT:** My election is only 101 days away.
In the past few months, we’ve proven that my campaign has the power to go all the way in this race.
**But it’s already February, and May 17th will be here before we know it. I’m running out of time to prepare, fundraise, and reach out to every voter in the district.**
My campaign is 100% grassroots funded and powered by everyday working people like you. It’s going to take a lot of $27 donations to keep my momentum up in this race.
[**_The grassroots donations I receive in February will be key to winning this race in May. And if everyone reading this email chipped in even a few dollars, I’ll blow my weekly fundraising goal out of the water. Will you chip in $27 to help me win in PA-18?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468919/328941156/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)
| | [Donate $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41468920/328941157/-2096412469?refcode=20220205_em_fr_b1_long_30op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmNlYmQ4Ni1hZjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_3xQFgSU3bhiKGTJq5HS6c-H1JuAixS7OGkUd0oxsmk=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Critical Race Theory and Tackling the "Woke Elite" – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132288?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
_"**I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character**."_
Those words spoken by Rev. Martin Luther King provide one of the best-known quotes in America's history. His words are as famous as anything Thomas Jefferson or Abraham Lincoln ever said.

Indeed, Rev. King’s words are as powerful as anything Jefferson or Lincoln said precisely because they are an appeal to the same principles upon which America was founded; **that all Americans are created equal.**

Today, however, Martin Luther King’s vision of America, and the Founding principles on which the Republic has been built, are under attack.

Instead of teaching us to judge fellow Americans according to the content of their character, a radical ideology, Critical Race Theory, is teaching Americans to see everything in terms of race.

**Critical Race theorists hold that the United States is founded on racial supremacy and oppression.** They reformulate the old Marxist idea that society is divided between the oppressors and the oppressed, replacing the class categories of bourgeoisie and proletariat with the identity categories of white and black.

This makes Critical Race Theory a deeply divisive ideology and an extremist one that seeks to overthrow America's existing social and economic order.
**Action to defeat this extreme ideology**
**Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we have been leading the fight against Critical Race Theory.** First, we published a report that detailed the extent to which this ideology is being taught in our public education system. You can read that evidence [**HERE.**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=62713de932&e=5703353baa)

We also produced a model piece of legislation to tackle Critical Race Theory. **Our proposal to tackle Critical Race Theory is entirely consistent with Rev. King’s vision of America. **It is also consistent with a belief in freedom and liberty.

**I am delighted to report that a bill on Critical Race Theory passed through the State Senate by a clear majority recently.** The bill is due to be assigned to a House committee shortly, and it is the only bill that addresses Critical Race Theory currently under consideration.

**It is not enough to pass a law to defeat Critical Race Theory. We need to explain to the rising generation of Mississippians what it is about America that makes this country so special. **
**Why CRT is wrong**
For most of human history, people were not treated as individuals in possession of inalienable rights. Hierarchy and hereditary were seen as the natural order. America, which was founded on the principle that all are created equal, was one of the first societies in the world where people began to be defined in terms of individual rights instead.

To be clear, the Founding principles were often very imperfectly applied. America produced laws and leaders that often failed to live up to the Founding principles. But that is not to say that the principles on which America was founded were themselves flawed. They are not.

The principles on which America was founded cannot be bettered. As Calvin Coolidge put it 150 years after the Declaration of Independence, _“If all men are created equal, that is final. If they are endowed with inalienable rights, that is final. No advance can be made beyond these [principles]."_

**Our "woke" elites today seek to return us to the pre-modern idea of group rights, collective identity, and advancement by caste. **

As Coolidge went on to warn, if anyone rejects the principles on which America was founded, the only direction in which they will take America is backward,_“Those that wish to proceed in that direction cannot claim progress.”_

How odd that today, Critical Race theorists call themselves progressives. If they prevail, they will take us back to a pre-modern past.

It is vital that we ensure that the rising generation in our state understands and appreciates why Critical Race Theory is so wrong and appreciates what makes America so exceptional.

**This is a fight we are going to win!**

Have a great weekend!
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---

Have a great weekend! | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | | | BEST OF BROADCAST | WLBT: Jackson Man Challenges State Laws to Open Home Health Business (MJI interview) | |

subject: Why are Canadian Truckers Standing up for their Rights?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Freedom is Simply Worth Fighting For | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/why-are-canadian-truckers-standing-up?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

The COVID-19 lockdowns and vaccine mandates have gone too far. It seems like everyone in America is losing their minds over Omicron, and the Left is to blame. They’ve stoked the flames of fear for their own benefit — for far too long. Biden, Malinowski, and Pelosi have conditioned Americans to live in fear and to believe the only way to ensure safety is to hand over their inalienable rights and sacrifice their way of life.
---
| [NEVER GIVE UP FIGHTING FOR FREEDOM, STAND WITH ME! JOIN HERE](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=b0751c45ce&e=f7e301a8ae "NEVER GIVE UP FIGHTING FOR FREEDOM, STAND WITH ME! JOIN HERE")
---
| Somehow, Canadians seem to get it better than many of our own elected officials. The Canadians are standing up for their rights. All across the nation, Canadian citizens have descended on their capitol grounds to protest for an end to their dehumanizing COVID-19 restrictions and tyrannical mandates.
---
| [BIDEN IS PUTTING AMERICANS SECOND, SUPPORT MY FIGHT TO RESTORE AMERICAN FREEDOM ](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=d53890c8e6&e=f7e301a8ae "BIDEN IS PUTTING AMERICANS SECOND, SUPPORT MY FIGHT TO RESTORE AMERICAN FREEDOM ")
---
| In 2022, we’re going to show our entrenched politicians that their time is up. This year, Americans are putting the Left on the chopping block. And once we send the Leftist cabal running Washington home, we can once again stand as a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for all.

That freedom is worth fighting tooth and nail for, _and it’s what we need now more than ever_.

I hope you’ll join my fight to bring the freedom-loving spirit of New Jersey back to Congress. It’s sorely needed.

_Phil Rizzo_
---

clean_body: Throughout my life, I’ve seen what hard work and American values can accomplish. I’m a business owner and family man, and I have this great country... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, My name is Bob Healey, and I’m running for Congress in New Jersey’s third district. Throughout my life, I’ve seen what hard work and American values can accomplish. I’m a business owner and family man, and I have this great country to thank for that. But, I’ve noticed a concerning shift of values in D.C. that are holding us back from great achievements. As a concerned father and employer of hundreds of Americans, I know first-hand that far-left liberals are taking us in the wrong direction. Socialist policies are leaving people out of work, cancel culture is silencing debate, and extremism is taking over in Washington, D.C. Across America, we’re all dealing with the consequences. Record-high inflation is keeping food off the table, our economy is in shambles, and Biden’s majority is pushing MORE taxes through Congress to fix it. To stop this destructive push towards socialism, we need to take back Congress in 2022, and it all starts with our CRITICAL battleground races like NJ-03. - My radical left-wing opponent Andy Kim votes in lock-step with Nancy Pelosi in Congress, and she will be flooding California money into this race. But if conservatives band together to flip tight races like ours, we can OUT-RAISE Pelosi’s war chest. I would really appreciate your support in this, Peter. Taking back Congress is CRITICAL for ALL Americans in 2022, but it’s going to be tough. If we don’t win back New Jersey’s 3rd, it won’t be possible. name: Greg Casar
subject: Housing is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/73564D43716F62364A366964633773364F42766B673951514A3946736F64584B3953452F445071436547347A793950796A4F6B725156705765756258792F445A/editor_images/IMG_0468.jpg]
Peter,
The pandemic has left so many Americans at-risk of housing insecurity and homelessness—including here in Texas. That’s why in Austin, we took steps to put in place COVID-19 eviction protections that have kept thousands of people in their homes, even in the worst of times.
These steps have helped Austin maintain one of the lowest eviction rates in the country during the pandemic. It’s kept thousands from losing their homes and becoming unhoused during a period of tremendous financial insecurity for our nation. But we can do more.
This week, I was proud to draft two resolutions approved by the Austin City Council that will permanently keep more people in their homes. These measures will protect the rights of renters to organize and give them a few more days to pay late rent, rather than be evicted immediately.
After leading the way during the pandemic, this vote continues our city’s commitment to making Austin a secure, livable city for more than half a million renters that live here. We need to protect renters’ rights for good. If we want to stop pushing people out of the city, we need to protect renters. If we want to reduce homelessness, we need to prevent evictions.
In the wealthiest nation on earth, every American should have a roof over their head and a place to call home. As a nation, we’ve often fallen short on our commitment to addressing housing insecurity and homelessness. When I’m elected to Congress, I’ll work every day to ensure more people have access to safe, affordable housing—as I’ve done throughout my career.
I’m so thankful to have you in this fight. Together, we can fight for a nation where housing is a human right.
Thank you,
-Greg
Greg Casar
Democratic candidate for Texas’s 35th Congressional District
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.05-email&amount=35]http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

Greg Casar for Congress

Austin, TX 78703
United States

**Governor Hogan delivered his final Maryland State of the State as governor. Governor Hogan gave the address from Maryland’s Old Senate Chamber, where George Washington resigned his commission to Congress as commander-in-chief of the Continental Army. This was the first peaceful transition of power from a military government to a civilian government in human history.**

**In the speech, Governor Hogan quoted Washington’s warning that partisanship would create a “spirit of revenge” that would undermine the “reins of government” and lead to the “ruins of public liberty.” Governor Hogan said, “to those who say that America is too divided, that our political system is too broken and can’t be fixed, I would argue that we have already shown a better path forward. And if we can accomplish that here in Maryland, then there is no place in America where these very same principles cannot succeed.”**

clean_body: | Governor Hogan delivered his final Maryland State of the State as governor. Governor Hogan gave the address from Maryland’s Old Senate Chamber, where George Washington resigned his commission to Congress as commander-in-chief of the Continental Army. This was the first peaceful transition of power from a military government to a civilian government in human history. In the speech, Governor Hogan quoted Washington’s warning that partisanship would create a “spirit of revenge” that would undermine the “reins of government” and lead to the “ruins of public liberty.” Governor Hogan said, “to those who say that America is too divided, that our political system is too broken and can’t be fixed, I would argue that we have already shown a better path forward. And if we can accomplish that here in Maryland, then there is no place in America where these very same principles cannot succeed.” | | | | | Governor Hogan recently spoke to and about how he’s maintained overwhelming support in Maryland by being willing to reach across the aisle and tell the truth. | | | AN UPDATE FROM TWITTER “This is another outrageous example of the Trump cancel culture that will only help elect more Democrats,’ Hogan said. ‘If we double down on failure and focus on the former president’s strange personal grievances, then we will deserve the result.” — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) To those who say that America is too divided and our political system can’t be fixed, I would argue that we have already shown a better path forward in Maryland. Let’s continue to set an example for the nation, so that America can once again be a shining example to the world. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) I'm grateful to Vice President for standing up for the truth. He is a true patriot, and I'm proud to call him a friend. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | ---|---|---

Peter,

When I hear that New Mexico families are struggling, I step up to that plate to help, no matter what the task is. **That's why I spent the day as a substitute teacher at Santa Fe's Salazar Elementary School last week. **
If you don't have children in kindergarten through 12th grade, it might sound strange to you that the Governor stepped in to help teach. But the truth is, the entire country is facing a teacher staffing shortage so severe that schools are shutting down for weeks at a time.
**I'll do whatever it takes to keep our kids in school here in New Mexico,** because they deserve the very best education. I served as a substitute as part of our new initiative that encourages the National Guard and state workers to sign up to become substitute teachers.
**To fix this teacher staffing shortage long-term,** I'm also introducing legislation that would raise compensation for educators. In doing so, we'll attract the best teachers in the region and encourage more New Mexicans to follow this essential career path.
**While I work to provide the best education for our state's next generation of leaders, I want to hear your insight. Please, tell me what you think about this issue before my poll closes at midnight tonight:**
None of my work to strengthen our state's schools would be possible without your grassroots support.

Thank you,

Michelle Lujan Grisham

subject: Hey...It's Mike

body:
Hope I'm not bothering you, but I need a quick favor.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3froj--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

---
|
Hey, it's Mike Pompeo. I’m just going to be blunt: I need your help.

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they want me to fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump.** That's why they are attacking me and wanting us to fail. If we fail, they can use it to say that our movement is dead!

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3froj-1wrqc-4qqlpo3/)
---

I’ve had the privilege of serving America nearly my entire life - first as a young cadet at West Point, then patrolling the Iron Curtain in the Army and finally in my capacity as your 70th Secretary of State. I am proud to have devoted so much of my life to serving the country I love and championing our American values.

Now, I’m continuing that fight with CAVPAC, my organization committed not only to ensuring Republicans take back majorities in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate, but also to gaining governorships and control of state legislatures all across America and to hold our leaders accountable for passing legislation that champions American values.

This is an incredibly important mission, and we cannot allow the Left to outraise us. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a $25 donation to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3froj-1wrqd-4qqlpo4/ "That’s why I’m asking you to make a $25 donation to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!")**

The radical Left is watching because they want us to fail, so I am incredibly grateful for whatever you can give to help us outraise the Democrats!

Never Give An Inch,

Mike Pompeo

My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they want me to fail. There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. That's why they are attacking me and wanting us to fail. If we fail, they can use it to say that our movement is dead! | I’ve had the privilege of serving America nearly my entire life - first as a young cadet at West Point, then patrolling the Iron Curtain in the Army and finally in my capacity as your 70th Secretary of State. I am proud to have devoted so much of my life to serving the country I love and championing our American values. Now, I’m continuing that fight with CAVPAC, my organization committed not only to ensuring Republicans take back majorities in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate, but also to gaining governorships and control of state legislatures all across America and to hold our leaders accountable for passing legislation that champions American values. This is an incredibly important mission, and we cannot allow the Left to outraise us. "That’s why I’m asking you to make a $25 donation to help us send a clear message to the radical Left that the America First team isn’t going away!" The radical Left is watching because they want us to fail, so I am incredibly grateful for whatever you can give to help us outraise the Democrats! Never Give An Inch, | Mike Pompeo | | | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | "PompeoEmailFooter" A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns. name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z42dap12174bn8sot1shus6leuh8kkdckrrj7l4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ie8oj2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3cb5caqb8cpkepr77djie2rm9c3me9pjathjeip76ddge5qb6s3163jj5dpj61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8q6cd34mkoefclicoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf1in26el5deuttv0ife1c933u62j75vmn2eq7eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ie8oj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhrqg8mntmj96e2dekq40ju5dh44g933g6lub588_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ie8oj2cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3sa9kqbh0aa6q2k48uas15go18uv530idsfkd68_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ie8oj2cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zbuo6sk4t6narprav5h32d22r9lgbgcq96lpef08).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvb2reibelf679htmd9qstlcesb0g94p8du9h8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1ie8oj2cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm not taking anything for granted...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Regardless of who my opponent is in November, this will be a hard-fought race
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471208/328955079/-1829049351?refcode=jtk632-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg5NjJlNS1iZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jYINxi6QltzywfkNSiG1GhuPz-KnnMjyiD3RK6FCUtM=)
---
Friend,
In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.
**Regardless of who my opponent is in November, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.**
With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority—affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade.
Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red.
With all eyes on New Hampshire, my campaign launched an emergency fundraising goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight. **[Reaching this goal will help my team build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. Can you rush $5 before midnight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471209/328955080/-1829049351?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk632-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg5NjJlNS1iZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jYINxi6QltzywfkNSiG1GhuPz-KnnMjyiD3RK6FCUtM=)**

clean_body: Regardless of who my opponent is in November, this will be a hard-fought race | | | = Friend, In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. Regardless of who my opponent is in November, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted. With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority—affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: logging off in a moment ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby. It's been a long week on the campaign trail here in Iowa, but I have a quick second to talk right now, and I wanted to reach out about a major policy announcement before logging off for the night.
I recently committed to supporting federal term limits and promised to only serve two terms in the Senate. Every day, more and more people are tuning in to our campaign and finding that they agree with us: My opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), has been in Washington for too damn long. (To defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Democratic majority, can you chip in a donation using the following link? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471205/328954886/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk642-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDg5NjJlNS1iZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pz8q-6GPBdKxyd6yYgszyEPJKmurcjP4hh3AFVjiZiA=))
Iowans know they deserve a leader who will fight for working families, who cares more about public service than any political ambitions, and who will look toward the future and move our state forward.
But for nearly half a century, we've been stuck with a man who votes against working families on everything from child tax credits to expanding affordable health care. A man who's been dining at elite D.C. cocktail parties since before I was born. A man who only cares about his own far-right agenda, not fixing the real problems facing our state and securing a bright future for the next generation.
It's probably clear by now, but this race is deeply personal for me. I lived in Iowa my entire life, and I'm from one of those working class families that Sen. Grassley left behind. **That's why I can promise you that I will do whatever it takes to defeat this man and flip this state blue.**
But to defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and give Iowans the new leadership they deserve, I need your help. **Please, will you chip in $5 – or whatever you can spare tonight – to help to flip this state blue? Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471206/328954887/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk642-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDg5NjJlNS1iZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pz8q-6GPBdKxyd6yYgszyEPJKmurcjP4hh3AFVjiZiA=)
Thanks for standing with me tonight. In a race this close, your donation really makes all the difference.
With gratitude,

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471207/328954888/496662621?refcode=jtk642-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDg5NjJlNS1iZTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pz8q-6GPBdKxyd6yYgszyEPJKmurcjP4hh3AFVjiZiA=&emci=ffa75e0b-4285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=248962e5-be86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).

subject: Keep Students in the Classroom!

body:
NH Dems have a different agenda....

name: Scott Kelly
subject: You don’t hear from me too often, so when I reach out I hope you know it’s important.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It’s Scott Kelly, Mark’s twin brother (also an astronaut!). I know Mark pretty well, better than most.
#

Friends —
It’s Scott Kelly, Mark’s twin brother (also an astronaut!).
I know Mark pretty well, better than most.
He’s a real leader and exactly the type of person that Arizona and our country needs in the Senate right now. He’s bringing people together at a time of increasing division, and is standing up to corporate special interest groups on behalf of Arizonans — no matter how hard they’ll campaign against him.
And the truth is, not everybody likes that. And that’s exactly why people like President Trump and Mitch McConnell are already working so hard to beat him.
It’s never easy watching your older brother (by six minutes) get attacked in TV ads and by the former president, but I’m grateful to know people like you have his back.
You don’t hear from me too often, so when I reach out I hope you know it’s important. And today, I have an important request:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my brother Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? He’s started February’s fundraising a little slower than we’d like, and he needs your help to catch up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=20&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220205-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**
---
****
You can always count on Mark to do what’s right for Arizona. He uses science, data, and facts to guide him as he works to deliver real results for Arizona families.
We need more of that in the Senate today, not less.
So thank you in advance for contributing today. I know it means a lot to Mark.
Scott Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2067_6688874_VcL_7b&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=2067%2E6688874%2EVcL_7b).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
