name: Giffords.org
subject: We’re humbly asking you to chip in $3 to help Gabby lead the fight to change our gun laws.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It's been more than a decade since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents.
#

Friends —
It's been more than a decade since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents. While she survived, six did not, and 13 others were shot.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
For Gabby, the road to recovery has been difficult, but she gets stronger and tackles new challenges every day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=2&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
After Gabby resigned from Congress, she focused on regaining her strength and rebuilding her life.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=3&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
But then a gunman killed 26 people, including 20 children, at Sandy Hook Elementary School. That moment spurred Gabby to reenter public service and found this organization. Since that tragedy, we've dedicated ourselves to making sure that no other family would have to experience losing a loved one to gun violence.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=4&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
We were all disappointed—furious, even—when a minority of Senators blocked a bill to close loopholes in our background check system and made it harder for criminals to get guns.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=5&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
We also have won some great victories. Together, we’ve played a role in helping to pass more than 465 laws that will make communities nationwide safer from gun violence.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=6&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
Yet we have still faced more difficult loss in our communities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=7&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
But like Gabby said when this organization first launched: changing our gun laws will be a long, hard struggle. And we can’t stop fighting now. Too many lives are on the line.
That’s why we are asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords today to help Gabby lead the fight to change our gun laws? She simply cannot do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-1-30&t=8&refcode2=1528_3935704_o6MvKI&akid=1528%2E3935704%2Eo6MvKI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: It's been more than a decade since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents. Friends — It's been more than a decade since a gunman tried to assassinate Gabby during a meeting with her constituents. While she survived, six did not, and 13 others were shot. For Gabby, the road to recovery has been difficult, but she gets stronger and tackles new challenges every day. After Gabby resigned from Congress, she focused on regaining her strength and rebuilding her life. But then a gunman killed 26 people, including 20 children, at Sandy Hook Elementary School. That moment spurred Gabby to reenter public service and found this organization. Since that tragedy, we've dedicated ourselves to making sure that no other family would have to experience losing a loved one to gun violence. We were all disappointed—furious, even—when a minority of Senators blocked a bill to close loopholes in our background check system and made it harder for criminals to get guns. We also have won some great victories. Together, we’ve played a role in helping to pass more than 465 laws that will make communities nationwide safer from gun violence. Yet we have still faced more difficult loss in our communities. But like Gabby said when this organization first launched: changing our gun laws will be a long, hard struggle. And we can’t stop fighting now. Too many lives are on the line. The story of American voting rights is deeply intertwined with the story of our civil rights. We’ve come a long way since only landowning white men could vote. But we still have a long, long way to go.

[This Black History Month, DASS is recognizing the deep ties between Black leaders and communities and the rights we hold most dear. As the voting rights advocates at _Democracy Docket_ put it:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471531/328957246/585747426?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjc2MmU5Yy1jNTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-OjKReUZBGyx-fWwNmZ4p7C7_10hbLKXh0Qz9QSNhM=&emci=3a3d91fc-ef85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=db762e9c-c586-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=26828920)

Hello,
Every 3 minutes, a new donor joins Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley.
Think about that: Every 3 minutes, someone like you opens an email like this, clicks the link, and chips in what they can afford to help turn Iowa blue and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
The early polls all show an extremely close race, but Mitch McConnell has already raised millions into Super PACs to attack Mike Franken and try to turn the Senate red.
When we’re up against corporations and special interests like Big Pharma and the NRA, there’s only one way to win: Mike’s not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, he’s running a people-powered campaign funded entirely by grassroots donations like yours.

| | | I'll be blunt, Fellow Conservative.

My biggest deadline of the year is here, and if we don't raise enough to meet my goal, you can say goodbye to Trump's legacy.

Here are the facts:
* Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN moved my race up on their list of Top 10 seats likely to flip and said my race is the "most important race for the Dems."

name: news@nanwhaley.com
subject: Abortion is on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We absolutely cannot let extreme Republicans turn back the clock on reproductive rights and abortion access in 2022 and beyond.

Team,
**In state legislatures across the country,** Republicans are working to dismantle reproductive rights and strip patients of the opportunity to make personal medical decisions.
**In our highest court,** Republicans are fighting to overturn Roe v. Wade.
**Even here in Ohio,** Republicans are attempting to pass legislation modeled after the archaic and harmful anti-abortion bills passed in states like Texas.
Abortion is on the ballot this November and _**we must fight back.**_
**[So that’s why we’re asking: if you support the right for all people to make choices about personal medical decisions for themselves, will you add your name right now to stand with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471792/328958698/-332925606?ms=nw_em_220205_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220205_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDk1NGM0OS1jNzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SvPC4VAHRFZOojdMKDMW6mL_prgc8ula49lAsWOKWAw=&emci=6e1b1d65-b086-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1d954c49-c786-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**
We absolutely cannot let extreme Republicans turn back the clock on reproductive rights and abortion access in 2022 and beyond.
**Nan believes every patient should have the opportunity to make their own decisions about reproductive care, their families, and their futures.** If you agree, we need you with us.
Let’s show extreme Republicans what this team can do and send a strong message:
**[Access to safe, legal abortion is at risk like never before – if you agree that we must protect this right, add your name right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41471793/328958699/-332925606?ms=nw_em_220205_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220205_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDk1NGM0OS1jNzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SvPC4VAHRFZOojdMKDMW6mL_prgc8ula49lAsWOKWAw=&emci=6e1b1d65-b086-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=1d954c49-c786-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=24357242)**

Team Nan

body:
We are worried would be a serious understatement... We are devastated!!! Every last one of our America first allies are in extreme danger of losing their elections to Trump-hating Liberals... unless we rally a historic response.

Trump-hating Liberals donated more than a BILLION DOLLARS online last year to destroy ALL of our America first allies! &n; bsp; &nb; sp;

**__****NEW INTEL JUST RELEASED:
Trump-hating Liberals donated more than a BILLION DOLLARS online last year to destroy ALL of our America first allies!****__****[SAVE OUR REPUBLICANS](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=23016&L=43115&F=H&)**
---
Friend, to say we are worried would be a serious understatement...
_We are devastated!!!_
Every last one of our America first allies are in extreme danger of losing their elections to Trump-hating Liberals... unless we rally a historic response.
[**This is so urgent that we just registered an EMERGENCY triple donation match to your email. If you step up for Trump and his closest allies RIGHT THIS SECOND, we 'll match your gift three-to-one.**](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=23016&L=43115&F=H&)
**Triple donation match ACTIVATED \-- use it now to save our America first allies!**
**[SAVE OUR REPUBLICANS](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=23016&L=43115&F=H&)**

PLEASE: Don't be intimidated by these Trump-hating Liberals. If every loyal Trump supporter steps up, we'll make history!
A billion dollars is enough to change everything. This is the most important election of our lifetimes and we cannot fall behind now. All of our America first allies are in serious trouble.
_The future of our great country depends on what you do next. _
[**Are you in?**](https://track.washingtonguardian.org/link.php?AGENCY=tv&M=1060046&N=23016&L=43115&F=H&)
For America,
Official Message From The Republican Whip

clean_body: Republicans have to fight back, Peter! | Peter, Partisan Democrats on the North Carolina Supreme Court just BLOCKED the fair maps passed by the duly elected members of the North Carolina General Assembly. This is an issue that’s a little in the weeds, but it’s fundamentally important to ensuring FAIR and CONSTITUTIONAL elections. Here’s what happened... The elected Democrats on the Supreme Court invalidated legal and fairly drawn maps in a politicized and party-line vote in order to hurt Republicans and help Nancy Pelosi win seats in Congress. Within hours of the Democrats vote to block fair maps, the Democrats in North Carolina and Washington were using the decision to raise money and attack Republicans. This is partisan politics, plain and simple. | DEFEND NORTH CAROLINA EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | If the Democrats get away with this partisan assault on North Carolina’s elections, there’s no telling what they’ll try next. They’re already forcing through aggressively partisan maps in Illinois, Maryland, and New York -- and trying to use their political power to tighten their grip on power in Washington. It’s time to draw the line and say “enough.” Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Erica Smith
subject: This is huge (redistricting news)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

This is huge.

Yesterday evening, the North Carolina Supreme Court struck down the
Republican gerrymandered congressional maps as unconstitutional, ordering
the state legislature to redraw them by February 18th.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38928?refcode=em20220205-853&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G ]North Carolina Supreme Court rejects redistricting map as
unconstitutional

The NC GOP’s gerrymander was a deliberate attempt to silence Black, brown,
and working-class voices in our district and across North Carolina. This
Supreme Court ruling is a victory for our democracy and a victory for
North Carolinians.

But with new district lines coming in just days, we have to be prepared
for whatever is thrown our way.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38928?refcode=em20220205-853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G ]That’s why I’m asking our strongest grassroots supporters: Can you make
an urgent $5 contribution, so we’re able to raise the
resources we need to respond?

Madison Cawthorn has made it clear that he has big plans for a far-right
takeover of North Carolina, and he’s already backing our extremist GOP
opponent, Sandy Smith.

Our district hasn’t had a Republican congressperson since 1882. And
there’s no way I’m letting insurrectionist traitor Sandy Smith be our next
representative.

That’s why it’s absolutely important that we have the funds we need to
compete and hit the ground running as soon as the new maps are released.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38928?refcode=em20220205-853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G ]If you’re with me, please rush a contribution of $5 or
whatever you can to help us win this wide-open U.S. House seat. Right now,
I need your support more than ever.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38928?refcode=em20220205-853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G ]Donate $5

Together, we’re going to win this seat and bring home change for the
communities and people that need it most.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/38928?refcode=em20220205-other-853&t=1023&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G ][IMG]

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220205-853-footer&t=1024&refcode2=853_3698_ScH56G&akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=853%2E3698%2EScH56G

I fought hard to build coalitions and write legislation that would have a meaningful impact on the city I call home. That's why having the endorsements of other Southern California elected officials means so much! San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria, Assemblymembers Chris Ward and Tasha Boerner Horvath, and country Supervisor Nora Vargas have all endorsed me in this race. I'm so honored to have their support. They are all powerful change-makers. Their endorsements show their confidence in me as a leader who can get real work done. = Thank you!! \-- Georgette = Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884 Georgette Gómez 5445 Madison Avenue Sacramento, CA 95841 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

name: Team Harder
subject: an eventful couple of weeks (with pictures!)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) | Peter, It has been an extremely busy past couple of weeks here on the Harder campaign - and not just because Josh and Pam are getting ready to welcome their new baby. We've been sprinting alongside Josh as he zig zags our newly formed district to hear from all the new voters. [**If you 'd like to chip in to help keep our campaign fueled (think: gas, house parties, lawn signs etc) please chip in here!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) Here we are in Stockton where we had such great turnout we kept the house party going well past sundown. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) Small businesses are a huge part of the Valley's economy so we did a whole listening tour with small business owners - here's Josh at Dealerz Choice in Stockton. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) Josh is also a big coffee and tea drinker, so we'd be lying if we didn't make multiple pit stops for caffeine... [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) And here is a photo from our first door knock of 2022! If you know Josh, you know how much he believes in knocking doors and hearing directly from folks in our community. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) It's been a whirlwind, but there's nothing better than being on the road with Josh talking with voters. A lot of people pulled us aside and said they were surprised with how energetic he is, and a few followed up whispering he doesn't seem like a politician... We'd be happy to yell that from the rooftops! Thanks for keeping our campaign fueled so we can do the hard work to keep this seat blue. Know that every dollar we raise goes directly into organizing efforts like this to keep us on the road. [**If you 'd like to contribute here's a link!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) Now, back to the road! \- Team Harder
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/f2X5hUFE27wgj83DTudAFN8j2O8wO0e7fOqvlUyr3oU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/_XIYekZzWLLY91QrLnNlVIhaW0Ht4afLJH4ZE-dK9N4=)

You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/l7gV8mPGq9_NVzsqay7HhtFNF2fRHHYPYMBiwHfoJxY=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/U68ycJtsotSqzcy7RiQQ8Nv0CRhfaSNs7tHfaWntp-M=) here.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jhDdhve7_awTzWR_rHOxwakOEDISeL7pxFAhqRVUQs0=/OgJ3ScyOhIpMll9Q6w_zhJd8dyATo1JN8P023iyCS2Y=?refcode=E13933-20220204-InDistrictUpdate-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19)

**Susan Wild's "Concedes to China" Bill**

This week, Susan Wild voted for HR 5421, which she calls the America Competes act, but it should be called the America Concedes to China Act.

The so-called COMPETES Act is nothing more than a Democratic wish list that stops any movement to hold China accountable or increase U.S. economic competitiveness in its tracks. It fails to include any measures to hold the Communist Chinese Party accountable for its military provocations, for its human rights abuses, or its role in the origins of COVID-19. Here are some of the Democrat provisions that are included though.

* Authorizes $8 billion for the Green Climate Fund, a U.N. slush fund that has already sent $100 million to the Chinese Communist Party.
* Creates “Climate Change Officers” within the Foreign Service, weakening our diplomats’ focus on core U.S. national interests.
* Goes beyond the Build Back Better provision to extend and expand Trade Adjustment Assistance into a $22 billion welfare program and weakens the connection between trade and covered job losses, furthering attempts to pay individuals not to work. (Pierce, is this in the USA? We should clarify)
* Despite two bipartisan votes in the House to hold the CCP accountable for their human rights abuses in the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region, the bill omits the word “genocide” from provisions on human rights in an effort to appease China.
* It is time we start to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for their actions, as your Congresswoman I will do just that.

Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Check out Lisa on Fox News! | Susan Wild's "Concedes to China" Bill This week, Susan Wild voted for HR 5421, which she calls the America Competes act, but it should be called the America Concedes to China Act. The so-called COMPETES Act is nothing more than a Democratic wish list that stops any movement to hold China accountable or increase U.S. economic competitiveness in its tracks. It fails to include any measures to hold the Communist Chinese Party accountable for its military provocations, for its human rights abuses, or its role in the origins of COVID-19. Here are some of the Democrat provisions that are included though. Authorizes $8 billion for the Green Climate Fund, a U.N. slush fund that has already sent $100 million to the Chinese Communist Party. Creates “Climate Change Officers” within the Foreign Service, weakening our diplomats’ focus on core U.S. national interests. Goes beyond the Build Back Better provision to extend and expand Trade Adjustment Assistance into a $22 billion welfare program and weakens the connection between trade and covered job losses, furthering attempts to pay individuals not to work. (Pierce, is this in the USA? We should clarify) Despite two bipartisan votes in the House to hold the CCP accountable for their human rights abuses in the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region, the bill omits the word “genocide” from provisions on human rights in an effort to appease China. It is time we start to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for their actions, as your Congresswoman I will do just that. subject: Jeff's Official!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
The Campaign Has Always Been About You! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-February Vol. 2, #3**
---
| | |
##
4 February 22

Jeff is officially on the ballot to represent Maryland's District 4 residents!

Becoming an "official" _federal_ candidate on the ballot is a two step process. First, the candidate must register with the Federal Election Commission (FEC) in order to raise funds and to publicly declare candidacy. Jeff did this in June of 2021. The second step is to register with the State Board of Elections in order to be listed on the ballot. Jeff did this yesterday.

Jeff shared, "This campaign has never been about me. It's about working to improve the lives of of our friends and neighbors. They deserve better. Rising prices are a natural and predictable outcome to uncontrolled government spending. We must support law enforcement if we want our communities to be safe. The spike in violent crimes and homicides is again predictable. We can do this while fighting for justice. Enough is Enough. My Certificate of Candidacy is not just a piece of paper or a formality. It memorializes the sacred trust between me and the people of District 4. I take this trust seriously and will do my best to serve and support you. I humbly and respectfully ask for your consideration and for your vote."

This is in part why our campaign is so important. We need Jeff Warner to help restore common sense policies and ease the burden that our District and our nation is experiencing.

**To celebrate, the campaign is hosting a Kick-Off Event Saturday, February 26, 5-7p in the Severna Park area. Please Save The Date. ** More details will be coming soon! Your participation is important since it will send a strong message regarding the uniqueness of our movement. Please use this event as an opportunity to invite others to attend who share our mutual concern for the area and for the nation. It will refresh their soul to meet other like-minded people and learn how together we can affect change.

The campaign is working hard to unveil an online system to impact and mobilize voters. No matter where people live, they have the opportunity to make a difference in the campaign and we’re working to provide the tools and training to make each volunteer successful at whatever level they can serve.

**[Volunteer Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=3aabbfd1f9&e=12a37459a2)**

The campaign has been blessed with nearly $20,000 in a short time. Thank You So Much for your generosity. You have made the campaign the third highest republican fundraising campaign in the last 35 years in District 4. Something unique appears to be happening. While this is an amazing start, we still have a long way to go. We need your help to invite others to be a part of this incredible adventure.

We're asking everyone who shares our concern for our country to give something. There is no such thing as a small gift. If everyone who is troubled by the direction of our country and wants to restore it gave something, anything... $5, $10, $20 per month, the campaign would be in GREAT financial shape.

By law, the maximum a person can give is $5800 ($11,600 per couple).
We're praying for people who can help jumpstart the campaign with this level of support.

**[Donate Here](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=d5684fae6c&e=12a37459a2)**

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "_We The People_ " can make a _real_ difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=741de050e1&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---
| | | _© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved._
Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=fe8e72d609) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=fe8e72d609).
---

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: What Does “The Good Life” Look Like?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-h2fcHHN

We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider
concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character,
and justice when we...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-h2fcHHN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend of Knowledge,

Are you
struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find
myself in that position as well. It's part of the human condition
to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people.

We teach
at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts
such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and
justice when we face difficult questions.

In the
Nicomachean Ethics-the first book written on how best to
live-Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a
person's character, which is formed by making good choices.

But good
choices don't come naturally. That's why every student at
Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is
so important to living a good life that we've produced our online
course, "Introduction to Aristotle's Ethics: How to Lead a Good
Life."

And now
you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale
College edition of Aristotle's Nicomachean Ethics, for personal
study.

You'll
not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with
Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also
explore ways to put this knowledge to work.

The DVD
gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those
here on campus, and you'll read from the same book the students
are in the course.

In
addition to the topics I've already mentioned, the course focuses
on subjects including:

Aristotle's Politics and the Nature of Man

Deliberation and Choice

Practical Judgment

Contemplation and Action

Just
consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently
said: "I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every
choice we make etches into our soul."

Make a
good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course.
Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer

After
watching the preview, if you're struggling with a thorny
question, I hope you'll join Rebecca and many others by reserving
your DVD of "Introduction to Aristotle's Ethics" along with its
companion book today. Quantities of the DVD and book are limited,
so don't wait too long to decide.

Warm
regards,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

Well, now we know exactly how Sinema was spending her time while delaying Democrats’ landmark climate and social spending bill. She was — wait for it — **spending thousands on a Michelin star restaurant and a five-star Paris hotel.** We’re almost running out of things to say except: It doesn’t have to be like this. With Sinema’s popularity in Arizona at an all-time low, all we have to do to oust her from the Senate is ensure that the organizers behind her future primary challenger have the resources they need to win. **[Sen. Sinema’s disrespect for the people she is sworn to serve is staggering — we need to hold her accountable for it NOW. subject: Chicago Tribune Acknowledges Our Hard Work
body:
We are the "most active" campaign. Help us keep up the momentum. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4fcaebd0689f/chicago-tribune-acknowledges-our-hard-work?e=339f142c50)

---
| |
# Be About That Action!
Yesterday, The [Chicago Tribune](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=43f21dea99&e=339f142c50) reported that **our campaign was the “most active” in regard to fundraising,** compared to the other 13 candidates in the race. Of course being referred to as the “most active” is a huge testament to our campaign because, since day 1, we’ve been #AboutThatAction. **This campaign is crashing down doors for a lot of people and inspiring hope.**
Huge shout out to the staff and volunteers at #TeamCole and all of the people that contributed to this action. We absolutely need to keep up this momentum to take home the W in June. We're a grassroots campaign, so every contribution counts toward paying staff and getting software to mobilize this district! [Donate a dollar](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=67fa82ef8c&e=339f142c50), [volunteer an hour](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=ad2fe0ef4c&e=339f142c50). Let’s Go!!
**We have a School House Jam Fundraiser on Feb 18th at the Promontory.** Come see your next First District Rep perform and help us raise $ for a great cause: having a representative that actually represents the people of the First District. Get your [tickets here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f84772cb75&e=339f142c50)!

Thank you so much for the support.

Yours in service,
Jahmal

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Olso?=
subject: Come out and hear Vic Mensa!
body:
Vic Mensa will be DJ'ing for Dr. Ameena Matthews on February 8th! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e0b891c2952/come-out-and-hear-vic-mensa?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Come out for a fundraiser at the Promontory!
---
|
---
| It’s almost time! That’s right - in just a few days, we will have**[our big fundraiser with Vic Mensa at the Promontory.](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=fef3af49bc&e=5fba611a2c)** Vic and Dr. Ameena have long been friends. They have worked together on issues around gun violence and community safety. They agree that the best way to reduce the violence is to reduce the inequality in the 1st District. That’s why we are excited about this upcoming fundraiser. Vic Mensa will be DJ’ing, and Dr. Ameena will be speaking about her vision for the future of the 1st District. Adi Amour will be opening for Vic, and Butta da Prince will also be performing. Breezy will be our MC. Come out and join us! **[Tickets are $20. If you join us as a supporter, for $50, we will include some campaign swag, such as a t-shirt and buttons.](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=a7b93dd0c5&e=5fba611a2c)** And for those who are members of our Host Committee, we will have the campaign plus a reserved table near the stage.
---
| [Get Tickets!](https://drameena.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e8541e883c7e489c2cd5d45b&id=181383f676&e=5fba611a2c "Get Tickets!")
---
| Also, we have two public meet and greets coming up! On February 11th we will be up in Wisconsin for the Interrupters Ball hosted by the Kenosha COR Coalition Organization Resolution. While there, we will have a Meet & Greet with All or None at 12:30 at their offices in Milwaukee. Also, on February 26th, we will be having a public Meet & Greet with My Chicago Radio at 1pm. We would love for you to come out and bring any questions you may have for Dr. Ameena!
---

name: Are You Still a Republican
subject: Please be truthful

body:
We need to know if you're still in support of putting America FIRST or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. | ****
---
**URGENT:
_The number of Americans identifying as Republican is the lowest it has been in a decade -- (from Gallup Polling)_**
* * *

Listen, Peter, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

| Have you left the Republican Party?

[** ****No, I'm still a Republican ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e674bd8718c403897f7dcb5b0183b0d&_e=ncwT1Qhvrw1kT9zjX1xcCJAF34s4SX_FUNb620hxB8vC5e1R0hh7I7fKLMwiykQ7suMQE_Y7MWnAv-QFkrcHsLXtYh7G4WxXXDYfZG0G7i41st0EtwLAlMfk4RFOzNgyAUHBi8t4BiYS0jdGUIisFxBmC0U4A6P3dIpKkvus49AxUrLygQrdbvYLYe1hR5yggwSnW0A1d9e4YnFClZVsNi4wNJgH_qfCImKCy_HwJdow6xYXCG1HbhiA8Anf0Ce82rjE18H-rCiQLIdjCNW7IT5K5iKfehc47qIG2rzqcZLIPzGx6FCV_HMRk4mXHDiJjOInkfcbdGRSbkPR9KAS56Wt5kpaC5poGvXs-naqGCl_tF-wRuoEGqBNWE9jVDvjFJ5zLlPgPgwQqk04D_6zFgLM03Eh3MvGX9WFGUViT4-EzybTJlmvA1gglJhuKsb_nP9sRMi6ZvcAfdMXUA1V3Q%3D%3D)

[** ****Yes, and now I'm a Democrat ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e674bd8718c403897f7dcb5b0183b0d&_e=ncwT1Qhvrw1kT9zjX1xcCJAF34s4SX_FUNb620hxB8vC5e1R0hh7I7fKLMwiykQ7suMQE_Y7MWnAv-QFkrcHsLXtYh7G4WxXXDYfZG0G7i41st0EtwLAlMfk4RFOzNgyAUHBi8t4BiYS0jdGUIisFxBmC0U4A6P3dIpKkvus49AxUrLygQrdbvYLYe1hR5yggwSnW0A1d9e4YnFClZVsNi4wNJgH_qfCImKCy_HwJdow6xYXCG1HbhiA8Anf0Ce8lcwXQm_FX1EAgwo6wusgSMiu5TLoThfw1kH8Ya0N72y7jLTL4lWr4hvrZ0NtG1AR6ZM9yMgwTRk70Z9TbHLmu42IDykIZDi87K9G--xedTjzr7AnlN0edUBJZZ1mwzrsuhSwxO9Z8ZCB-g3SRy_Wmeix_oaEZ-xqWMVVVcjWxET44jLziRWvIL1pySHP9mgbz94kXlaGyeDDnKUOcjDRdw%3D%3D)

Is it true? [**Respond now ➞**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9e674bd8718c403897f7dcb5b0183b0d&_e=ncwT1Qhvrw1kT9zjX1xcCJAF34s4SX_FUNb620hxB8vC5e1R0hh7I7fKLMwiykQ7suMQE_Y7MWnAv-QFkrcHsLXtYh7G4WxXXDYfZG0G7i41st0EtwLAlMfk4RFOzNgyAUHBi8t4BiYS0jdGUIisFxBmC0U4A6P3dIpKkvus49AxUrLygQrdbvYLYe1hR5yggwSnW0A1d9e4YnFClZVsNi4wNJgH_qfCImKCy_HwJdow6xYXCG1HbhiA8Anf0Ce8D9Yq5KeQKgT3JIfU4roohFMx9N7O0yRKPxcPP1VKzFun6La2N8DtH3YQFr1EzvFXS4G1d1sSSmiuEaIJzho6-0mlvGNjsJO0Z3uDxqIHdJcZiA5oqxvOeEuhvVpbhWvO7Err-_elr8S_6uEmGwmVEn2XjWpAprdGxcM5cTjb8OldMbbusegVwzuO0tU3q3VXQys6SmQM3--BF2cvbnQb4w%3D%3D)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden's Trojan horse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
Friend, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will never change: Our inalienable American rights.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z11tccvj7husidoovletkmooighrft090pve9lt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chg60oj6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr66lgj9ddnmlim6dj36apb2s3gskprcc9keipj0or4cpq64obnckrmcsdjc4rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phgmspm0ptimdj32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

|
---
| | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Friend, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfv0masqj2e1mcfgnd6b4v2scta8tcfbmnaosij0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chg60oj6cdh2bs "CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES")**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches--trampling citizens' personal freedoms--Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

Friend, America can never be allowed to become a woke, leftist utopia -- **[which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zoj2qha0njdmlolokjmd7l4q309on8jb7m71aak0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1chg60oj6cdh2bs "which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.")**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. name: Team Schmidt
subject: One week closer to election day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
We cannot believe we just turned the page on the first month of 2022, meaning we’re one month closer to Election Day when we will flip Kansas red. Friend, We cannot believe we just turned the page on the first month of 2022, meaning we’re one month closer to Election Day when we will flip Kansas red. We share these endorsement updates with you each week to keep you posted on who is joining Team Schmidt and to give you the chance to share with your family and friends so they can join our movement. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=026a8733ed3f4434a1ff4d8a8da22c4d&_e=A-CxvSuIbs2JqlSKsD8iz3_aYPpLTgWSVAqIIPk6FLnQbBwUTNQS5vIGOhQ63MrFwbgwe_ZGF8EdbEMJPCa6Hb7YF7i1LowYqq4lkSxiWyHk3t9lnusrzYpXBDOyH5bDz16X5pk3gLaecc1audXzC-df73Ei_3sfBf17c8dTlp7Udnh6A_cNjFqL6536CaNiP9KGMKBMn7tpY3kUJyyG9woB1gh7naoEZDyjopGNZgxWr4zTH1UX7DbPyZwSAHvYhPuQj94xtRvx0krcPdXGvAwIGJq1Fr5wmGLkJDi3Nbk83Z0XpNErNxgEAiuqpw1AHkVH3aoDOqmfSNdpGWrfkWslnqvlcnTo8y9MZ0A8n415avHEP13kIWNXn7dkRUoYNC1Osjx5pKXFzAyyicMVI6G0A9jnBYLLeqIpi_UR8CUdsQZsU77cw_GT4rMtKgbVe6D-v2N3Aj3By1WXj5rYH1GjNtDSZW0dIa8iilDnPrT1MbboK06HQxP9DxsZ5LZH) Check out our recent endorsements below: _“It is abundantly clear that we need a new governor who has a vision for long-term fiscal health for our state. Governor Kelly is touting the same reckless, big-spending policies of the Biden administration, which have led to record inflation. Instead, we need a policy champion like Attorney General Derek Schmidt as governor who stands ready to lead on thoughtful reform by finding commonsense ways to rein in government spending, stop the ever-increasing tax burden on Kansas families, and push back on harmful government overreach.” _ **_State Director Elizabeth Patton, Americans for Prosperity - Kansas_** _“During my tenure serving as the Russell County Sheriff for 16 years, I had the opportunity to work with Derek Schmidt on multiple occasions. He is approachable, personable, and above all professional. Derek has shown his leadership skills and commonsense approach to decision making as our Attorney General. He is a proven supporter of law enforcement. Derek represents all the qualities Kansans need in their Governor. He has my full support and I encourage everyone to vote for Derek Schmidt for Governor in November.”_ **_John Fletcher - Former Russell County Sheriff_** Thanks for being part of our team, friend. We’re grateful we can count on you to help us elect Derek as our next governor to help bring common sense and conservative leadership back to Kansas. Thanks, Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: [ANSWER NEEDED] Why do you support our campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, as one of our active supporters, John, Gisele, and the rest of our HQ staff were wondering:
**[Why do you support the John Fetterman for Senate campaign?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220205-4474&t=1&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)**
**[Share now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220205-4474&t=2&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)**
Right now, just over three months away from our primary, is the *perfect* time to share your input with us, Derek.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat. Plus, Gisele loves hearing about all the reasons why you also love John. ❤️
**[So, will you please take one minute of your time to share why you support our campaign, Derek?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220205-4474&t=3&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)**
**[Share now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-supporter-survey-email/?source=ema20220205-4474&t=4&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
More soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220205-4474-footer&t=5&refcode2=4474_434096_H_vLlM&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4474%2E434096%2EH_vLlM)

clean_body: Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. | Everything is at stake, this year Peter. We must mount our strongest effort yet to help Republicans nationwide win tremendous turnaround victories and seize majorities from the Biden-Harris Democrats. That’s what it’s going to take to bring the disastrous, socialist, open borders Democrat agenda to a screeching halt - and set up the opportunity to retake the White House in 2024. But to achieve everything we need between now and next November to make this historic reversal, we’re counting on our most committed supporters Joe Biden and the Democrats have proven to be a disaster for America. They STOPPED all the progress we made on the border wall under President Trump, opened our borders and allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood into our country. That’s just the beginning, too, Peter - they’re rolling out their radical schemes to further shrink our freedoms and increase their control over America: 1. Passing legislation to make it even easier to cheat in elections with their absurdly named “For the People Act” ... 2. Conniving to further erode our Second Amendment rights by increasing background checks and banning whole classes of firearms... 3. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline, reducing American energy output, importing more oil from overseas, and driving up prices for workers and families... 4. Pushing disastrous plans to “Defund the Police” and further divide our people over identity politics pandering... | Great America PAC has proven we can take on the Democrats and BEAT them, and we’re getting ready to do it again. Peter, will you please continue to back our indispensable effort of ensuring Republican victories by renewing your 2022 Membership Card RIGHT NOW? subject: Guess who just endorsed me?
body:
Hi there, Marianne Williamson just endorsed me! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41472950/328965301/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU1NjBjYy1kYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4alK5sQKZT5YZgsBak55XcUjVvbZ0TnIaccwdUNf-E=) I’m honored to receive her endorsement. Marianne was the first presidential candidate to support reparations, and she brought countless new people into the political process. Her message of economic justice, moral repair, reversing climate change, peace, and investing in children and youth — this is a message I stand for, too. We need a corporate money-free Congress to achieve these goals, and I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money. My opponent is the 15th most conservative Democrat in the House and has taken millions of dollars from corporate PACs — while claiming to fight big money in politics. name: Welch for Vermont
subject: I’m only asking because this is important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It shouldn’t be hard for our government to help people. But we keep watching critical legislation get stalled and filibustered by the Mitch McConnell Republicans in the Senate.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
Hi There,
It shouldn’t be hard for our government to help people. But we keep watching critical legislation get stalled and filibustered by the Mitch McConnell Republicans in the Senate. It’s frustrating to watch, especially when there’s so much to get done. And it’s a stark reminder of why we need change, and need it now.
That’s why it’s imperative we elect a progressive like Peter to the Senate. Peter’s been on the frontlines as Vermont’s congressman working to protect our imperiled democracy, expand access to rural broadband, provide affordable child care for working families, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. He chooses governing over gridlock every time, and we have to do everything we can to elect him and ensure Democrats keep control of the Senate.
[**Peter can’t do it alone. Will you chip in $5 to help us elect a progressive to the Senate?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=3&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=14&amount=3&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=16&amount=15&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=18&amount=28&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=20&amount=50&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=10&amount=100&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=12&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
---

---
With control of the Senate on the line, Mitch McConnell and his national Republican allies will do everything they can to try and buy this seat. And with a Trump appointee exploring a run for this seat, we have no time to waste. If we’re going to elect a Vermont progressive who will bring our values to the Senate, we need to act right away.
[**Keeping Vermont and the Senate blue is the only way to protect the progress that we’ve made and make sure our government is working for the people it serves. We need all hands on deck to make it happen. Please contribute whatever you can to show Peter you’re in this fight with him.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1327?t=7&akid=97%2E61531%2EeP4JF_)
Thanks for being a part of this movement we’re building,
Team Welch

---

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: A transparent update on our travel plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're setting a $100,000 goal to keep Beto on the road and fund our events.
#
Beto just kicked off our statewide Drive to Keep The Lights On in remembrance of last year's deadly power grid collapse.
**Over the next 11 days, Beto will be traveling over 2,100 miles to over 20 cities and towns** that were hit by the winter storms that left millions of families without heat, electricity, and running water for days.
But to be transparent, this much travel is a major expense — especially in such a large state. **So, we're setting a $100,000 goal to keep Beto on the road and fund our events.**
[Every donation will go toward printing campaign literature, reserving event spaces, and _most importantly_ , putting gas in Beto's truck. Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more to power our Drive to Keep The Lights On? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52506?refcode=ema20220205-174862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52506?refcode=ema20220205-174862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)
There's no denying that last year's grid collapse was preventable, and unfortunately, Greg Abbott has failed to do enough to stop it from happening again. **Instead of fixing the grid, Abbott has protected the profits of his mega-donors.**
As governor, Beto will make sure we have a government that works for, and is accountable to, everyone in this state. That's why he'll be on the road hearing directly from those who stepped up to lead in their communities when their own governor refused to. Beto will also lay out steps to bring utility costs down and make sure this crisis doesn't happen again.
[Reaching this goal will be critical to meeting thousands of new folks, spreading the word about our campaign for ALL Texans, and defeating Greg Abbott. Please, if you can, chip in $3 or more today to keep Beto on the road. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52506?refcode=ema20220205-174862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52506?refcode=ema20220205-174862&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220205-174862-footer&t=23&refcode2=174862_444211_ocsl6V&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=174862%2E444211%2Eocsl6V)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Mariannette Miller-Meeks
subject: I’ve let you down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress

It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: | We won’t stand for ultra-partisan gerrymandering. Friend, Last year, Republicans passed redistricting maps — signed off by Mike DeWine — that were so blatantly gerrymandered that the Ohio Supreme Court threw them out. Ohio Republicans have enjoyed blatant corruption in Columbus for decades, weaponizing it to pass their radical, far-right agenda. Here’s the thing: They know that fair maps won’t give them the supermajority they need to further solidify that corruption, and they know that they can’t win over voters on the issues. The GOP has one aim with their corrupt, ultra-partisan gerrymandering tactics (tactics that Ohioans TWICE voted to do away with.) They are trying to make it impossible for Democrats to win. Thanks for taking action, Team Cranley-Fedor = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = | Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: this photo was taken 30 years ago ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473386/328970794/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk627-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDExYzYxZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S87UJIkpgbFvZcjoAV_ZoLeopZfdlLEVhwunWADIxFA=)
Peter – When this photo of me was taken, my opponent Sen. Grassley had _already_ been in DC for 17 years. Despite promises to the contrary, he'd also already turned his back on working families like the one I grew up in. Good-paying jobs started disappearing. People left Iowa.
Thirty years later, Sen. Grassley is _still_ in Washington and has done nothing to fight for our working families. Instead, Sen. Grassley bought himself a nearly million-dollar home in our nation’s capital.

**That little girl you see in the picture? Well, she grew up to be the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Now, with your help, I'll defeat Sen. Grassley ****and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate.**
I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But my family taught me that when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes – and right now, Sen. Grassley is causing a lot of problems for Iowa and our democracy. Rather than take action to protect our workers and unions, or at bare minimum protect the right to vote, Sen. Grassley is beholden to the far-right agenda of the former president who endorsed him at a rally here in Iowa.
**It's no wonder Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans know it's time to show him the door, and I promise you nobody is going to work harder than me to do it. But to win in November and protect our Senate majority, I need your help.**
**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you make a $5 donation right here and now to finally defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and give working families a leader who will fight for them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473387/328970795/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk627-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDExYzYxZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S87UJIkpgbFvZcjoAV_ZoLeopZfdlLEVhwunWADIxFA=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473388/328970796/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk627-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDExYzYxZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S87UJIkpgbFvZcjoAV_ZoLeopZfdlLEVhwunWADIxFA=)
---
Thank you for having my back here.

clean_body: | | | = Peter – When this photo of me was taken, my opponent Sen. Grassley had already been in DC for 17 years. Despite promises to the contrary, he'd also already turned his back on working families like the one I grew up in. Good-paying jobs started disappearing. People left Iowa. Thirty years later, Sen. Grassley is still in Washington and has done nothing to fight for our working families. Instead, Sen. Grassley bought himself a nearly million-dollar home in our nation’s capital. That little girl you see in the picture? Well, she grew up to be the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Now, with your help, I'll defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But my family taught me that when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes – and right now, Sen. Grassley is causing a lot of problems for Iowa and our democracy. Rather than take action to protect our workers and unions, or at bare minimum protect the right to vote, Sen. Grassley is beholden to the far-right agenda of the former president who endorsed him at a rally here in Iowa. It's no wonder Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans know it's time to show him the door, and I promise you nobody is going to work harder than me to do it. But to win in November and protect our Senate majority, I need your help. = | | = Thank you for having my back here. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

body:
Your input means a lot to me, and I would be so grateful if you could take a moment to share what issues are most important to you and your family.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473390/328971501/122893247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVkOTFhZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5BQAuGbiANQAntN6MemiL0wfAnhDrutzzF95CjEjd0=&emci=7e9c0f0b-c886-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=89ed91af-e186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=19650583) Hey — In this race, we are up against no fewer than nine far-right opponents who continue to embrace fringe conspiracy theories, abortion bans, and anything else that will earn them Donald Trump’s endorsement. But here’s the thing. If we’re going to win in November, it’s not enough to just be against these dangerous policies. We need to show Nevadans what we’re for — my vision for championing working families and keeping our state moving forward. [**That’s why I’m getting in touch today, folks. Your input means a lot to me, and I would be so grateful if you could take a moment to share what issues are most important to you and your family.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473391/328971502/-2100857173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVkOTFhZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5BQAuGbiANQAntN6MemiL0wfAnhDrutzzF95CjEjd0=&emci=7e9c0f0b-c886-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=89ed91af-e186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=19650583) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473392/328971503/-1516160725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVkOTFhZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5BQAuGbiANQAntN6MemiL0wfAnhDrutzzF95CjEjd0=&emci=7e9c0f0b-c886-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=89ed91af-e186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=19650583)

Despite the challenges we’ve faced here in Nevada, we’re currently experiencing one of the best economic recoveries in the country. Our wage growth has outpaced inflation, tourism is close to reaching pre-pandemic levels, and our public health insurance option will make care more affordable for Nevadans.
But we’ve still got a lot of work to do — and I want to hear from you about what would make the biggest difference in your life.
[**Will you please take my short survey, Friend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473393/328971504/-2100857173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVkOTFhZi1lMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J5BQAuGbiANQAntN6MemiL0wfAnhDrutzzF95CjEjd0=&emci=7e9c0f0b-c886-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=89ed91af-e186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=19650583)
Thank you,
Steve

To put it bluntly, Republicans will retake Senate control if Democrats abandon this fight.

Trump has been holding rallies EVERY MONTH to rally his MAGA base around anti-vax, anti-democracy Senate candidates, and current polling shows THREE of them on track to win and give Mitch McConnell the majority.

name: Donna Imam
subject: It was because of this that I could live my American Dream
body:
Hard work got me a full ride to grad school at Purdue where Neil Armstrong had studied engineering. I thought I was living the dream. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473548/328981526/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGIzMDEzMS1lNjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIF3JJwwEXNwOJ0Y34StFVcYdGm7mmtmYJ7-QR9rguw=)
Friend, The cost of education in our country has gone up over 3000% in the last few decades — that makes no sense! Higher education and high skilled training is the single most effective path to innovation and securing our nation's future. Falling behind due to insurmountable student-loan debt is the single biggest threat to our economic prosperity and national security. **We can’t afford to fail when it comes to education. Parents in Austin and across our nation need help right now.** [**Friend, can you make your first $5 contribution today to our campaign, so I can take my solutions to lower the cost of education to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473549/328981527/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220205_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGIzMDEzMS1lNjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIF3JJwwEXNwOJ0Y34StFVcYdGm7mmtmYJ7-QR9rguw=) Hard work got me a full ride to grad school at Purdue where Neil Armstrong had studied engineering. I really thought I was living the dream, but it was really the opportunity to graduate debt free that made my American dream a reality. This is why in Congress one of my key goals is not just to eliminate student loans, but to lower the cost of education so every parent can have the peace of mind that there is a bright future for our next generation. **So that every American, like me, can go to college, trade schools, or certification programs debt-free.**

We built it up to a 4000+ member organization, I was elected president, we raised tens of thousands of dollars to provide free training and education to anyone who wants it to help boost careers and paychecks. **We helped thousands and that's when I realized we must do more. name: Team Lopez
subject: UPDATE: How to help get Greg Lopez get on the ballot
body:
You can help flip Colorado back to the people--by getting Greg on the primary ballot.
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015NP4ZPmifL5j2FrvhAe3iTTqG91SCiLp0XzuroRjaavHYQwievknEeKpo_6pL49CCKfMhSsJX4G3JuS1fG_bLkOjGLyfAkym4MDuooSeELHNtouD2K3LMr9zVcFDbTrB9hpMqdKdRqESfxh_UpiaLA==&c=07hl8Zxlct8zUMfuH_Sroq8ZzyHX27M6t0nVEv1c9cmst0E3PmNMMg==&ch=wtKURzAreMF-31P3XL_B4I2jz_P5Ryh5mHCXC9Rf_ocjY7VTiOMtlQ==)
---
| |
---
| Help Greg Lopez on the Primary Ballot
---
Greg has to win the vote of 30% of the state delegates at the State Assembly on April 9th.
Yes, you can be an official elected delegate that will determine who will be on the Primary ballot! Your voice and vote as a delegate represent hundreds of your neighbors and is hundreds of times more influential now than when you vote in the primary and general elections as an individual citizen!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Save these action dates:
1\. Monday February 7th [Register as Republican ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015NP4ZPmifL5j2FrvhAe3iTTqG91SCiLp0XzuroRjaavHYQwievknEfNi1W40bK0tvIcD-lolVKSAPFhksjKryQl-A9yNjMrc2MVUZT1dgLx7umwVbGdTTzLOyEABH55O8aTBg-KEyvXqBDhVu5LvWpSi9r_36IkJEQj7mZGKzwDBI4nb-9DSvTFLNHHIepu7BJ50TNzGUQg1CA9mcFJa8g==&c=07hl8Zxlct8zUMfuH_Sroq8ZzyHX27M6t0nVEv1c9cmst0E3PmNMMg==&ch=wtKURzAreMF-31P3XL_B4I2jz_P5Ryh5mHCXC9Rf_ocjY7VTiOMtlQ==)by this Monday to be eligible to participate in local Caucus
2\. Tuesday March 1st Attend and run for delegate at local precinct caucus meeting
3\. Saturday March 19th Attend and vote for like-minded candidates at County Assembly CORRECTION: 4. Saturday April 9th (NOT April 16th) Attend and vote for Greg Lopez for Governor at the State Assembly
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| To be eligible to vote and run for delegate to represent your neighborhood precinct for your county and state ballot, you must be a registered republican by Monday, February 7th.
To become a delegate, you must attend your neighborhood precinct caucus on Tuesday night 7pm March 1st, submit your name to be a delegate and be elected by your other precinct attendees. ONLY registered Republicans can participate in GOP precinct caucus to run and/vote to become a delegate.
[The Colorado Secretary of State's page is where you can check your registration status, verify that you are registered as a Republican and if your registration is active.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015NP4ZPmifL5j2FrvhAe3iTTqG91SCiLp0XzuroRjaavHYQwievknEfNi1W40bK0tgWwXquviHRdZjWei3eW9MDaB0IhdYqo3i6u-PG6k0otsTEyCWDwUdZFsULwBx4Q34QqqmSF83iZXVqUlgDYy54b7J015n9rkb6Lr7DGj_ruIeA8F-izPkulCToFuaWb3ltrPNmrupog=&c=07hl8Zxlct8zUMfuH_Sroq8ZzyHX27M6t0nVEv1c9cmst0E3PmNMMg==&ch=wtKURzAreMF-31P3XL_B4I2jz_P5Ryh5mHCXC9Rf_ocjY7VTiOMtlQ==) If you are NOT registered as a Republican, you must change your party affiliation to R and you can do that under the Change Party Affiliation tab. If NOT registered at all, you can register there too.
At SoS site you will find out which precinct you are in (last 3 numbers of your registration ID). Then at your county GOP website you will be able to find where your precinct caucus will be meeting on Tuesday March 1st at 7p. Come early at 6:30 and bring your family and friends of registered republicans (18 and over) nominate and vote for each other to become delegates and alternates for your precinct and change your county and state!
Tell all your like-minded friends and neighbors to come to their neighborhood caucus meeting in March 1st, ask them to run for delegate and vote for each other. Run for state delegate and alternate and attend state assembly on Saturday April 9th to vote for Greg Lopez for Governor.
Just three meetings, caucus night on March 1st, county assembly on Saturday March 19th and State assembly on Saturday April 9th at the World Arena, located at 3185 Venetucci Blvd., Colorado Springs, CO 80906.
Three of the most impactful votes of the election year to determine who will be the people's candidates on the June Primary ballot. Be the change we have been waiting for. Become a delegate and vote for the best conservative candidates at all office levels and Greg Lopez for Governor!
---
| |
---
| | | [Verify Your Voter Information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015NP4ZPmifL5j2FrvhAe3iTTqG91SCiLp0XzuroRjaavHYQwievknEfNi1W40bK0tgWwXquviHRdZjWei3eW9MDaB0IhdYqo3i6u-PG6k0otsTEyCWDwUdZFsULwBx4Q34QqqmSF83iZXVqUlgDYy54b7J015n9rkb6Lr7DGj_ruIeA8F-izPkulCToFuaWb3ltrPNmrupog=&c=07hl8Zxlct8zUMfuH_Sroq8ZzyHX27M6t0nVEv1c9cmst0E3PmNMMg==&ch=wtKURzAreMF-31P3XL_B4I2jz_P5Ryh5mHCXC9Rf_ocjY7VTiOMtlQ==)

clean_body: You can help flip Colorado back to the people--by getting Greg on the primary ballot. | | | | | | | | == | | | Help Greg Lopez on the Primary Ballot Greg has to win the vote of 30% of the state delegates at the State Assembly on April 9th. Yes, you can be an official elected delegate that will determine who will be on the Primary ballot! Your voice and vote as a delegate represent hundreds of your neighbors and is hundreds of times more influential now than when you vote in the primary and general elections as an individual citizen! | | | | | Save these action dates: 1\. Monday February 7th this Monday to be eligible to participate in local Caucus 2\. Tuesday March 1st Attend and run for delegate at local precinct caucus meeting 3\. Saturday March 19th Attend and vote for like-minded candidates at County Assembly CORRECTION: 4. Saturday April 9th (NOT April 16th) Attend and vote for Greg Lopez for Governor at the State Assembly | | | | | | To be eligible to vote and run for delegate to represent your neighborhood precinct for your county and state ballot, you must be a registered republican by Monday, February 7th. To become a delegate, you must attend your neighborhood precinct caucus on Tuesday night 7pm March 1st, submit your name to be a delegate and be elected by your other precinct attendees. ONLY registered Republicans can participate in GOP precinct caucus to run and/vote to become a delegate. == If you are NOT registered as a Republican, you must change your party affiliation to R and you can do that under the Change Party Affiliation tab. If NOT registered at all, you can register there too. At SoS site you will find out which precinct you are in (last 3 numbers of your registration ID). Then at your county GOP website you will be able to find where your precinct caucus will be meeting on Tuesday March 1st at 7p. Come early at 6:30 and bring your family and friends of registered republicans (18 and over) nominate and vote for each other to become delegates and alternates for your precinct and change your county and state! Tell all your like-minded friends and neighbors to come to their neighborhood caucus meeting in March 1st, ask them to run for delegate and vote for each other. Run for state delegate and alternate and attend state assembly on Saturday April 9th to vote for Greg Lopez for Governor. Just three meetings, caucus night on March 1st, county assembly on Saturday March 19th and State assembly on Saturday April 9th at the World Arena, located at 3185 Venetucci Blvd., Colorado Springs, CO 80906. Three of the most impactful votes of the election year to determine who will be the people's candidates on the June Primary ballot. Be the change we have been waiting for. Become a delegate and vote for the best conservative candidates at all office levels and Greg Lopez for Governor! | | | | | == | | | == Follow Greg == == == == == == Join us. Friend,
---
I hate to bring you bad news, but the Wisconsin Supreme Court has REFUSED to uphold the law, denying our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission for their unlawful guidance.
---
It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts.
---
**_But I will _never_ be deterred. The Court’s decision simply means the stakes of our toss-up governor’s race are that much higher._**
---
To ensure our elections are secure and free of fraud ahead of 2024, we must FIRE Tony Evers so we can enact election security.
---

clean_body: Our state’s highest court chose NOT to uphold the law and secure our elections. | Friend, I hate to bring you bad news, but the Wisconsin Supreme Court has REFUSED to uphold the law, denying our case against the Wisconsin Elections Commission for their unlawful guidance. It is truly a sad day when our state’s highest court will not act to ensure YOUR vote counts. But I will never be deterred. The Court’s decision simply means the stakes of our toss-up governor’s race are that much higher. To ensure our elections are secure and free of fraud ahead of 2024, we must FIRE Tony Evers so we can enact election security. We cannot trust a radical Democrat like Tony Evers to protect the integrity of our elections. He already VETOED 6 separate election security bills in one fell swoop. And all the while, Evers has the gall to attack me for wanting to ensure that every LEGAL vote counts. There is too much on the line this year, Friend. The very core of our democracy – your fundamental right to have your vote count – depends on our ability to defeat Tony Evers in this must-win race. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

subject: I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41473610/328986157/-42398318?refcode=em20220205pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTEzYTYxOC1lODg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyco1lFxFYJYbRl26m03n0-mlSLEtVCziruCfCIpB_I=)

clean_body: Hello, It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.” Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well. Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over. January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy. An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur. The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
