name: Morgan Harper
subject: A quick note from me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
What we did last month was huge.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220205-624-footer-ak&t=2&akid=624%2E90090%2E6DauSk)
I wanted to reach out quickly today to thank you personally. **Thanks to your support and all of our grassroots supporters, we were able to hit our January end-of-month fundraising goals and are starting off February strong already.**
Last month was huge, from our debate with Josh Mandel to collecting signatures so we could officially file to get on the ballot for this election to the U.S. Senate.
February is shaping up to be even bigger for our campaign, and everything that we can accomplish will be thanks to our grassroots support. We’re just months away from our primary election, and we’re putting everything we can into building our movement here in Ohio. That’s why your support is so critical right now.
So, thank you for your support. **[If you’re able to chip in right now to keep fueling this campaign, it’d go a long way toward accomplishing all our goals for February and beyond.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24919?t=3&akid=624%2E90090%2E6DauSk)**
Have a great weekend,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24919?t=4&akid=624%2E90090%2E6DauSk)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220205-624-footer&t=5&refcode2=624_90090_6DauSk&akid=624%2E90090%2E6DauSk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)

It was an honor to join Dan Bongino to discuss a multitude of topics and my run for the U.S. Senate seat in the great state of Alabama.

We talked a lot about the will and dedication of Gary Gordon and Randy Shughart and their bravery that day they saved my life in Somalia. That’s why I promised myself that I would never stop fighting to do better for my family, for my employees, and for my country.

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: VICTORY: NC maps struck down as unconstitutional gerrymandering!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This means not only the Senate majority but also the U.S. House majority could come down to North Carolina.
#

**NEWS: North Carolina’s Supreme Court rules maps were unconstitutionally gerrymandered!**
**[Rush a donation to our campaign today to help us organize across North Carolina and turn our state blue!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-2-ma&refcode2=362.357359.xlkwix&t=1&akid=362%2E357359%2Exlkwix)**
Last night, the North Carolina Supreme Court rejected the districts drawn by Republicans in the state legislature as an unconstitutional partisan gerrymander.
This is a win for democracy and all voters.
Republicans tried to rig our democracy in their favor, but justice has prevailed. Now, we will have a fair shot at getting maps that reflect the diversity of our state.
This means not only the U.S. Senate majority but also the U.S. House majority could come down to North Carolina — and what we are collectively able to accomplish in this campaign.
Cheri and all of us are committed to leading this ticket and organizing everywhere to turn our state blue. Together, we can elect new leadership for all North Carolinians, but Cheri cannot do it alone.
**[Will you please make a $3 donation to organize across North Carolina, flip this Senate seat and elect Democrats up and down the ballot? Republican attacks on democracy are not going to stop, so we need a massive people-powered movement to fight back and win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220205-2-ma&refcode2=362.357359.xlkwix&t=2&akid=362%2E357359%2Exlkwix)

My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**

My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. While national Republicans are funneling upward of $10 million into this race to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly: = | | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. Val Demings \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Rep. Friend,

Radical leftists are ruining Oregon and the career politicians are looking the other way.
**_I’m putting my foot down._**

The left has run our beautiful Oregon into the ground for four decades. Our streets are ridden with crime, our cities are boarded up, and our police don’t have the resources to keep our families safe. It’s time to end their one-party rule and get to work saving our state.
| [**SAVE OREGON NOW!** ](http://links.bridgetbartonforgovernor.com/u/click?_t=5342268651e04598a3527701291f718e&_m=75848d0cdba14709965fb87f1e0cc813&_e=B6uooEksmW6rJXFzqcxiZ1_9YNmMO3MhnJFsjwNc6IfFzihiFsn7F_MTI3bHqxHrUCBL3fgl0-Un8IcYducwOp_y7ds_MF3XDAAb6MFsJQWfQUzi9msJbF7TAx0rHfsau70foZ18C7ZxGWMtDhkwGRIsPnJcMkAzFChWqah2kRAOZ4AJKu2GEAJw9hQZBV1oAKkHMA8ob-bdWML8d41w3AUh0F0cFn4OlFJuD509mqWCFdElENQbadf6vRuZrWoPsIrACCBjbpD64LDaZlz75wJkKT6exT83MWJHcOBxu44BCZkQ6rM95oK2fGklzvUEiodBV7XjE34zbqUIMDUsoysymrAMsj2TL2n36Mvo4b6sV2xEKXio5O5T0-PhqkW16be4nKRhqthjnaKFQkBYdJLYyk2fdtSHawX4gc7QDgwtctId-Azex-KOs5BfcvARuwAkQ2oDUsYoHjSGIwluTAAmNBbxWrpUFBy-w27IeKWJ0MS8sERjscX2Y6tyKE6jxvWp2lFoHlfNzzdBZb0YUQ%3D%3D)

I’m Bridget Barton, and I’m a Republican for Governor. I’ve never been afraid to do hard things. I started a conservative magazine in a liberal state, I broke horses to help put my kids through college and as a young woman I faced my own alcoholism. I am grateful for my 40 years in recovery, experience that gives me unique expertise dealing with the intertwined crises of homelessness, substance abuse, and surging crime.

I’m relentlessly optimistic that Oregonians will choose an outsider and problem solver like me to set our state on a new path, but it won’t happen if we stay on the sidelines.
[**RESTORE GREATNESS!** ](http://links.bridgetbartonforgovernor.com/u/click?_t=5342268651e04598a3527701291f718e&_m=75848d0cdba14709965fb87f1e0cc813&_e=B6uooEksmW6rJXFzqcxiZ1_9YNmMO3MhnJFsjwNc6IfFzihiFsn7F_MTI3bHqxHrUCBL3fgl0-Un8IcYducwOp_y7ds_MF3XDAAb6MFsJQWfQUzi9msJbF7TAx0rHfsau70foZ18C7ZxGWMtDhkwGRIsPnJcMkAzFChWqah2kRAOZ4AJKu2GEAJw9hQZBV1oAKkHMA8ob-bdWML8d41w3AUh0F0cFn4OlFJuD509mqWCFdElENQbadf6vRuZrWoPsIrACCBjbpD64LDaZlz75wJkKT6exT83MWJHcOBxu44BCZkQ6rM95oK2fGklzvUEjFWVgoMm10gwx1VKrChJF0asn-f1r0Kuys9Cl-LFw15ZEofCyz_U6jPC3hTvEU8P5njrAgiYHFWXmcJTHIIEM6Q0YYa56H6ApRbCPIMAylt_tMfunmURBDHR63yYZhFRMxHZ9jcVjjQTwrb4jQkM17K36mxaLJ2D-EEi8dtO3GMhtlwHKruWFw8L2BOkm8RML7TmXJfAZfhWNFghO3i5qQ%3D%3D)

**_Saving Oregon won’t be easy. Politicians will say it can’t be done. But I’m no politician. I’m an Oregonian. We don’t let anyone tell us what can’t be done!_**

**_Will you join me?_**
In standing with law enforcement over lawlessness.
In creating safer communities, neighborhoods, and cities.
In restoring academic standards and excellence in our schools.

When I’m elected governor, the mandates are over; we’ll have our freedom back! I can’t wait to UNLEASH Oregon!

clean_body: The Red wave is coming to Oregon. | Friend, Radical leftists are ruining Oregon and the career politicians are looking the other way. I’m putting my foot down. The left has run our beautiful Oregon into the ground for four decades. Our streets are ridden with crime, our cities are boarded up, and our police don’t have the resources to keep our families safe. It’s time to end their one-party rule and get to work saving our state. | I’m Bridget Barton, and I’m a Republican for Governor. I’ve never been afraid to do hard things. I started a conservative magazine in a liberal state, I broke horses to help put my kids through college and as a young woman I faced my own alcoholism. I am grateful for my 40 years in recovery, experience that gives me unique expertise dealing with the intertwined crises of homelessness, substance abuse, and surging crime. I’m relentlessly optimistic that Oregonians will choose an outsider and problem solver like me to set our state on a new path, but it won’t happen if we stay on the sidelines. Saving Oregon won’t be easy. Politicians will say it can’t be done. But I’m no politician. I’m an Oregonian. We don’t let anyone tell us what can’t be done! Will you join me? In standing with law enforcement over lawlessness. In creating safer communities, neighborhoods, and cities. In restoring academic standards and excellence in our schools. In protecting and promoting our small business owners. When I’m elected governor, the mandates are over; we’ll have our freedom back! I can’t wait to UNLEASH Oregon! I am so grateful for all your support. Let’s unleash Oregon together, Bridget Barton Republican Outsider for Governor Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon Copyright © 2022 Bridget Barton for Governor, All rights reserved.

# We don't need a "gunslinger!"
---
| [](https://tan434.keap-link008.com/v2/click/2d26d702e8f8e505f610c9839dface55/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8la9tSrK_uRKSUqgvRtQydiIOaGWYygkj_3fjAlYLrnHuSmxswkiKuNZTAiop-AT3w2BpnkHhmiVX7nOaTfDTu9-Bk6Fh5Gx2Ut6_hD_BMjQvJ8NWhIJv1dNbUq2q3qFeNkE552fGXZzDMP5r5clovoOt-evFseH4RdYCSfcRHIW2kFG_9SfgDswtllgVso8dUEWrLaWvPmTNsKdlbn8SQBDmKMUMdd5ZQvMo5JP3-SYPXl727A7xFas8=)

| Friends, In 1961, the John Wayne film, The Comancheros came out. The U.S. had $250 Billion in debt and a population of 183.7 million. Average national income was $5,000 and 27% of that, was what each American owed on it. **Today, our debt has increased 120 times that amount and is now at $30 TRILLION. (That’s 30 MILLION MILLIONS Folks!) During the same time, household income grew at 1/10th the rate of our debt.** Now, our debt is over 166% of our average annual household income! Something is devastatingly wrong. I hope you’re as mad as me about it. After all, WE didn’t spend this money - but we have allowed the people who did to remain in power. **There’s no time like today to turn the tide and secure the future for ourselves and generations of Americans to come.** **Will you join me?**
---
| |
---
**We don't need John Wayne and we certainly don't need Alec Baldwin.****We just need an expert mathematician with courage - and enough patriotic Americans to put him in office.** **Send me to the U.S. Senate and get the popcorn ready!**

It is a great day at The Nation’s Gun Show. As a true conservative, I will always support the Second Amendment and I will not back down under pressure from the Far-Left.
---

| I unequivocally support our Second Amendment. It is in the Constitution to protect citizens from government overreach. It is our inherent right to defend ourselves, our family and our property. Radical Democrats' recent attempts to criminalize law-abiding gun owners are misguided and unconstitutional.

Efforts to destroy the Second Amendment empower an out-of-control government and erode our liberty. World history has consistently demonstrated after a government disarms its citizens, tyranny ensues. I will proudly defend our Second Amendment to ensure that NEVER happens here.

In Congress, I will fight any and all efforts that chip away at our Second Amendment rights.
Best,
****

Jeanine Lawson
Congressional Candidate, VA10

[](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=b5e0dcef82&e=b87254c2cd) In case you missed it, we wanted to share this great profile of Betsy from this morning's _Oregonian -- _[click here to check it out](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=001234512b&e=b87254c2cd). These are some highlights from the article:

_Betsy Johnson was one of the first women certified by the Forest Service to haul external loads while piloting a helicopter, including the water and retardants used to combat wildfires. She flew helicopters in competitions in the former Soviet Union, and once parked a jet ranger atop the U.S. Bancorp Tower. But she never joined her sister, Patti, stunt-flying with the U.S. Aerobatic team...

...She'll barnstorm through the state in late spring, seeking the 25,000 signatures she needs to land on the Oregon ballot as an unaffiliated candidate.

And it's telling just how many veteran political observers, exhausted by the Democratic and Republican alternatives, are on board..._ **Help us get the word out by sharing on social media and via email:** **[Share on Facebook](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=1895dfec66&e=b87254c2cd)** **[Share on Twitter](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=d03a9d06fa&e=b87254c2cd)** **[Share via Email](mailto:?subject=Check out this article&body=https://runbetsyrun.com/the-oregonian-the-free-flying-betsy-johnson-steve-duin-column/)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Democrats are soft on crime
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6141126?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Across the nation, violent crime is surging and anti-police rhetoric, calls to defund the police, and Democrats' soft on crime policies are responsible.

Don’t let the Democrat blame game fool you (it's as fake as Kamala claiming she’s working to secure the border). Whether it's ‘bail reform’ here in New York, or Maxine Waters calling for more confrontation in Minnesota - Democrats are the ones to blame, they should stop pointing fingers and start taking responsibility.

We can’t have elected officials using their office to try to strip our police funding and make out communities more dangerous - but that's what they’ve been doing.

Democrats control the House - they have one-party rule and are using it to push the most radical legislation we have seen in decades. They aren’t looking out for you or your family, they’re looking out for their power and their pockets.

This is what we mean when we say the stakes of this election couldn’t be higher.
* We’re talking about the safety of our communities
* The funding of our police
* And keeping violent criminals off our streets

This could not be more important.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| [Protect our communities](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=e8feb340aa&e=13f35c4add "Protect our communities")
---
| [End dangerous democrat policies ](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=5e900ef7fe&e=13f35c4add "End dangerous democrat policies ")
---
|
---
| If you want safe streets, well-funded police, and strong communities - your vote in November just got a whole lot easier. There’s only one party fighting for those priorities, and I am proud to be a part of it.

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

Is it true? [**Respond now ➞**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=147010cc3b4b473894ac1679a255a3de&_e=1AcXnQ5CmS_oy3hNfgey19zVwIJrpPf48L0A6Tc49f-Qo0ypsjF1yKinZKpIsj29sNOTuEgLsl6e8E9WM0b-bxbgMLaOzpcsy91A0dDI-58ajbqw7jHfJ272LRt5leI9R1RDPPw8Et361vn8U4PSYs12-zCB46xAHxHEemPbqsqnFX5RsbbHqjY1SAwKAdSilot6Mt5tnyHnUtzqzs6UVy1ZDS1oZe4OP0zmiRNWobX-rnnSEqEcuhrLWL8-Aa-aR7QrwcvR_2wAZz2OGAK_1jARZlKdrJmRphAgL1hJz87-v94qJIf3GHyrBhBwo9ykQOPBFQctxe6iW-CKrO4_4naNIoCj1xOFH4uuoJ3IhRHRW9w5UNjQMEzmuykJKyVp7MJRZv5AomDOhdRsrIbBGDEA9k98zJpTpbI5IY5ZC-VIejhFdwtEeHv_RA2846o_T5QPlRmoA5OEwe2SM61lP0llYpT8c0kJBNI9qie0-GU%3D)

name: Trump Lunch Alert
subject: There’s not much time left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
DOUBLE your chances NOW
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlUcGOmzAQ_RpyM4IBG3LgsFmaw0bqdXtDrj0Ep7ZBxmya_foObraXSiPLeu_5zcyz7kC1oNTBdFAAVcGhKnnR5JLXY1m0SoytwrKBrC7uxud69tLqWwybW3I1u8PUAYAQUh75yEHU5c-mRVG3dc21akt5FAfbTTEua1a9ZHCmWlFtAXOyC6h3kx2TH8ikw2CUZLfZ-MjGzesgzWr8lZHImRgRSZp6s9Eyu3k1MfidVWfp5s3HrOp5kYHYohscarM5QtBJY4dpfOLrvAWFhDs1eEn1xJV0izRXT8xXEsN_nVg0DpmfI0Mfkab_K0m0tBjisO_xXOPLeCZpmi3d1jio5RHWwSsLVVWSavDWaOLf_bS8LLfP6zGBk9GUWf95Anf-xt_kIXR6uRtrzSoa-o7rvlj6AxrdmvHRZc0pA0jvAFLccKlPP76Ly_ulZ6df-s56wev7zsIrnfGx4D_p0yVPge1o0_8BKyyxow)
